duas.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي أَحْيَانَا بَعْدَ مَا أَمَاتَنَا وَإِلَيْهِ النُّشُورُ
duas.transliteration: Alhamdu lillahil-ladhi ahyana ba'da ma amatana wa ilayhin-nushoor
duas.translation_en: All praise is for Allah who gave us life after having taken it from us and unto Him is the resurrection.
duas.translation_ar: الحمد لله الذي أحيانا بعد ما أماتنا وإليه النشور

duas.arabic: بِاسْمِكَ اللَّهُمَّ أَمُوتُ وَأَحْيَا
duas.transliteration: Bismika Allahumma amootu wa ahya
duas.translation_en: In Your name O Allah, I die and I live.
duas.translation_ar: باسمك اللهم أموت وأحيا

duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ تَوَكَّلْتُ عَلَى اللَّهِ وَلَا حَوْلَ وَلَا قُوَّةَ إِلَّا بِاللَّهِ
duas.transliteration: Bismillahi tawakkaltu 'alallahi wa la hawla wa la quwwata illa billah
duas.translation_en: In the name of Allah, I place my trust in Allah, and there is no might nor power except with Allah.
duas.translation_ar: بسم الله توكلت على الله ولا حول ولا قوة إلا بالله

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ خَيْرَ الْمَوْلِجِ وَخَيْرَ الْمَخْرَجِ بِسْمِ اللَّهِ وَلَجْنَا وَبِسْمِ اللَّهِ خَرَجْنَا وَعَلَى اللَّهِ رَبِّنَا تَوَكَّلْنَا
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inni as'aluka khayral mawliji wa khayral makhraj. Bismillahi walajna wa bismillahi kharajna wa 'alallahi rabbina tawakkalna
duas.translation_en: O Allah, I ask You for the best entering and the best exiting. In the name of Allah we enter and in the name of Allah we leave, and upon Allah our Lord we place our trust.
duas.translation_ar: اللهم إني أسألك خير المولج وخير المخرج بسم الله ولجنا وبسم الله خرجنا وعلى الله ربنا توكلنا

duas.arabic: أَصْبَحْنَا وَأَصْبَحَ الْمُلْكُ لِلَّهِ وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ وَلَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ
duas.transliteration: Asbahna wa asbahal mulku lillah walhamdu lillah wa la ilaha illallahu wahdahu la shareeka lah
duas.translation_en: We have entered the morning and the whole kingdom of Allah has entered the morning. All praise is for Allah. None has the right to be worshipped except Allah, alone, without partner.
duas.translation_ar: أصبحنا وأصبح الملك لله والحمد لله ولا إله إلا الله وحده لا شريك له

duas.arabic: أَمْسَيْنَا وَأَمْسَى الْمُلْكُ لِلَّهِ وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ وَلَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ
duas.transliteration: Amsayna wa amsal mulku lillah walhamdu lillah wa la ilaha illallahu wahdahu la shareeka lah
duas.translation_en: We have entered the evening and the whole kingdom of Allah has entered the evening. All praise is for Allah. None has the right to be worshipped except Allah, alone, without partner.
duas.translation_ar: أمسينا وأمسى الملك لله والحمد لله ولا إله إلا الله وحده لا شريك له

duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ
duas.transliteration: Bismillah
duas.translation_en: In the name of Allah.
duas.translation_ar: بسم الله

duas.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي أَطْعَمَنِي هَذَا وَرَزَقَنِيهِ مِنْ غَيْرِ حَوْلٍ مِنِّي وَلَا قُوَّةٍ
duas.transliteration: Alhamdu lillahil-ladhi at'amani hadha wa razaqanihi min ghayri hawlin minni wa la quwwah
duas.translation_en: All praise is for Allah who fed me this and provided it for me without any might or power from myself.
duas.translation_ar: الحمد لله الذي أطعمني هذا ورزقنيه من غير حول مني ولا قوة

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ افْتَحْ لِي أَبْوَابَ رَحْمَتِكَ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma iftah li abwaba rahmatik
duas.translation_en: O Allah, open the gates of Your mercy for me.
duas.translation_ar: اللهم افتح لي أبواب رحمتك

duas.arabic: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ الْعَظِيمُ الْحَلِيمُ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ رَبُّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيمِ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ رَبُّ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَرَبُّ الْأَرْضِ وَرَبُّ الْعَرْشِ الْكَرِيمِ
duas.transliteration: La ilaha illallahul-'Azimul-Halim. La ilaha illallahu Rabbul-'arshil-'Azim. La ilaha illallahu Rabbus-samawati wa Rabbul-ardi wa Rabbul-'arshil-Karim
duas.translation_en: None has the right to be worshipped except Allah, the Magnificent, the Forbearing. None has the right to be worshipped except Allah, Lord of the Magnificent Throne. None has the right to be worshipped except Allah, Lord of the heavens, Lord of the earth and Lord of the Noble Throne.
duas.translation_ar: لا إله إلا الله العظيم الحليم، لا إله إلا الله رب العرش العظيم، لا إله إلا الله رب السماوات ورب الأرض ورب العرش الكريم

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ رَبِّي لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ خَلَقْتَنِي وَأَنَا عَبْدُكَ وَأَنَا عَلَى عَهْدِكَ وَوَعْدِكَ مَا اسْتَطَعْتُ أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا صَنَعْتُ أَبُوءُ لَكَ بِنِعْمَتِكَ عَلَيَّ وَأَبُوءُ لَكَ بِذَنْبِي فَاغْفِرْ لِي فَإِنَّهُ لَا يَغْفِرُ الذُّنُوبَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma anta Rabbi la ilaha illa anta, khalaqtani wa ana 'abduka, wa ana 'ala 'ahdika wa wa'dika mastata't. A'udhu bika min sharri ma sana't. Abu'u laka bini'matika 'alayya, wa abu'u laka bidhanbi faghfir li fa innahu la yaghfirudh-dhunuba illa ant
duas.translation_en: O Allah, You are my Lord. None has the right to be worshipped except You. You created me and I am Your servant, and I abide by Your covenant and promise as best I can. I seek refuge in You from the evil of what I have done. I acknowledge Your favor upon me and I acknowledge my sin, so forgive me, for none forgives sins but You.
duas.translation_ar: اللهم أنت ربي لا إله إلا أنت خلقتني وأنا عبدك وأنا على عهدك ووعدك ما استطعت أعوذ بك من شر ما صنعت أبوء لك بنعمتك علي وأبوء لك بذنبي فاغفر لي فإنه لا يغفر الذنوب إلا أنت

duas.arabic: سُبْحَانَ الَّذِي سَخَّرَ لَنَا هَذَا وَمَا كُنَّا لَهُ مُقْرِنِينَ وَإِنَّا إِلَى رَبِّنَا لَمُنْقَلِبُونَ
duas.transliteration: Subhanal-ladhi sakhkhara lana hadha wa ma kunna lahu muqrinin. Wa inna ila Rabbina lamunqalibun
duas.translation_en: How perfect He is, the One Who has placed this (transport) at our service, and we ourselves would not have been capable of that, and to our Lord is our final destiny.
duas.translation_ar: سبحان الذي سخر لنا هذا وما كنا له مقرنين وإنا إلى ربنا لمنقلبون

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ رَبَّ النَّاسِ أَذْهِبِ الْبَأْسَ اشْفِهِ وَأَنْتَ الشَّافِي لَا شِفَاءَ إِلَّا شِفَاؤُكَ شِفَاءً لَا يُغَادِرُ سَقَمًا
duas.transliteration: Allahumma Rabban-nas, adhhibil-ba's, ishfihi wa Antash-Shafi, la shifa'a illa shifa'uk, shifa'an la yughadiru saqama
duas.translation_en: O Allah, Lord of mankind, remove the harm and heal him, for You are the Healer. There is no cure except Your cure, a cure that leaves no illness.
duas.translation_ar: اللهم رب الناس أذهب البأس اشفه وأنت الشافي لا شفاء إلا شفاؤك شفاءً لا يغادر سقمًا

duas.arabic: أَعُوذُ بِكَلِمَاتِ اللَّهِ التَّامَّاتِ مِنْ غَضَبِهِ وَعِقَابِهِ وَشَرِّ عِبَادِهِ وَمِنْ هَمَزَاتِ الشَّيَاطِينِ وَأَنْ يَحْضُرُونِ
duas.transliteration: A'udhu bikalimatillahit-tammati min ghadabihi wa 'iqabihi, wa sharri 'ibadihi, wa min hamazatish-shayatini wa an yahdurun
duas.translation_en: I seek refuge in the perfect words of Allah from His anger and His punishment, and from the evil of His servants, and from the whisperings of the devils and their presence.
duas.translation_ar: أعوذ بكلمات الله التامات من غضبه وعقابه وشر عباده ومن همزات الشياطين وأن يحضرون

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ عِلْمًا نَافِعًا وَرِزْقًا طَيِّبًا وَعَمَلًا مُتَقَبَّلًا
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inni as'aluka 'ilman nafi'an, wa rizqan tayyiban, wa 'amalan mutaqabbalan
duas.translation_en: O Allah, I ask You for beneficial knowledge, wholesome provision, and acceptable deeds.
duas.translation_ar: اللهم إني أسألك علمًا نافعًا ورزقًا طيبًا وعملاً متقبلاً

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اهْدِنِي فِيمَنْ هَدَيْتَ وَعَافِنِي فِيمَنْ عَافَيْتَ وَتَوَلَّنِي فِيمَنْ تَوَلَّيْتَ وَبَارِكْ لِي فِيمَا أَعْطَيْتَ وَقِنِي شَرَّ مَا قَضَيْتَ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma ih-dini fiman hadayt, wa 'afini fiman 'afayt, wa tawallani fiman tawallayt, wa barik li fima a'tayt, wa qini sharra ma qadayt
duas.translation_en: O Allah, guide me among those You have guided, pardon me among those You have pardoned, turn to me in friendship among those on whom You have turned in friendship, and bless me in what You have bestowed, and save me from the evil of what You have decreed.
duas.translation_ar: اللهم اهدني فيمن هديت وعافني فيمن عافيت وتولني فيمن توليت وبارك لي فيما أعطيت وقني شر ما قضيت

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَيِّبًا نَافِعًا
duas.transliteration: Allahumma sayyiban nafi'a
duas.translation_en: O Allah, (bring) a beneficial rain cloud.
duas.translation_ar: اللهم صيبًا نافعًا

duas.arabic: سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ وَبِحَمْدِهِ سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ الْعَظِيمِ
duas.transliteration: Subhanallahi wa bihamdihi, Subhanallahil-'Azim
duas.translation_en: Glory be to Allah and His is the praise, Glory be to Allah, the Most Great.
duas.translation_ar: سبحان الله وبحمده سبحان الله العظيم

duas.arabic: اللَّهُ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا هُوَ الْحَيُّ الْقَيُّومُ لَا تَأْخُذُهُ سِنَةٌ وَلَا نَوْمٌ لَّهُ مَا فِي السَّمَاوَاتِ وَمَا فِي الْأَرْضِ مَن ذَا الَّذِي يَشْفَعُ عِندَهُ إِلَّا بِإِذْنِهِ يَعْلَمُ مَا بَيْنَ أَيْدِيهِمْ وَمَا خَلْفَهُمْ وَلَا يُحِيطُونَ بِشَيْءٍ مِّنْ عِلْمِهِ إِلَّا بِمَا شَاءَ وَسِعَ كُرْسِيُّهُ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضَ وَلَا يَئُودُهُ حِفْظُهُمَا وَهُوَ الْعَلِيُّ الْعَظِيمُ
duas.transliteration: Allahu la ilaha illa huwal-Hayyul-Qayyum. La ta'khudhuhu sinatun wa la nawm. Lahu ma fis-samawati wa ma fil-ard...
duas.translation_en: Allah - there is no deity except Him, the Ever-Living, the Sustainer of existence. Neither drowsiness overtakes Him nor sleep. To Him belongs whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth...
duas.translation_ar: الله لا إله إلا هو الحي القيوم لا تأخذه سنة ولا نوم له ما في السماوات وما في الأرض

duas.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ اللَّهُمَّ وَبِحَمْدِكَ أَشْهَدُ أَنْ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ أَسْتَغْفِرُكَ وَأَتُوبُ إِلَيْكَ
duas.transliteration: Subhanakal-lahumma wa bihamdika ashhadu an la ilaha illa anta astaghfiruka wa atubu ilayk
duas.translation_en: How perfect You are O Allah, and I praise You. I bear witness that none has the right to be worshipped except You. I seek Your forgiveness and turn to You in repentance.
duas.translation_ar: سبحانك اللهم وبحمدك أشهد أن لا إله إلا أنت أستغفرك وأتوب إليك

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ لَكَ الْحَمْدُ أَنْتَ كَسَوْتَنِيهِ، أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ خَيْرِهِ وَخَيْرِ مَا صُنِعَ لَهُ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّهِ وَشَرِّ مَا صُنِعَ لَهُ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma lakal-hamd, anta kasawtanihi, as'aluka min khayrihi wa khayri ma suni'a lahu, wa a'udhu bika min sharrihi wa sharri ma suni'a lahu
duas.translation_en: O Allah, to You be all praise, You have clothed me with it. I ask You for the good of it and the good for which it was made, and I seek refuge with You from the evil of it and the evil for which it was made.
duas.translation_ar: اللهم لك الحمد أنت كسوتنيه، أسألك من خيره وخير ما صنع له، وأعوذ بك من شره وشر ما صنع له

duas.title_en: Dua When Looking in the Mirror
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ حَسَّنْتَ خَلْقِي فَحَسِّنْ خُلُقِي
duas.transliteration: Allahumma anta hassanta khalqi fahassin khuluqi
duas.translation_en: O Allah, You have made my physical form beautiful, so make my character beautiful also.
duas.translation_ar: اللهم أنت حسنت خلقي فحسن خلقي

duas.arabic: اللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ، اللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ، اللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ، سُبْحَانَ الَّذِي سَخَّرَ لَنَا هَذَا وَمَا كُنَّا لَهُ مُقْرِنِينَ، وَإِنَّا إِلَى رَبِّنَا لَمُنْقَلِبُونَ. اللَّهُمَّ إِنَّا نَسْأَلُكَ فِي سَفَرِنَا هَذَا الْبِرَّ وَالتَّقْوَى، وَمِنَ الْعَمَلِ مَا تَرْضَى
duas.transliteration: Allahu Akbar, Allahu Akbar, Allahu Akbar, Subhanal-ladhi sakhkhara lana hadha wa ma kunna lahu muqrinin, wa inna ila Rabbina lamunqalibun. Allahumma inna nas'aluka fi safarina hadhal-birra wat-taqwa, wa minal-'amali ma tarda
duas.translation_en: Allah is the Greatest, Allah is the Greatest, Allah is the Greatest. Glory be to Him who has subjected this to us, for we could never have done it by ourselves. Truly, to our Lord we are returning. O Allah, we ask You for righteousness and piety in this journey of ours, and for deeds that please You.
duas.translation_ar: الله أكبر، الله أكبر، الله أكبر، سبحان الذي سخر لنا هذا وما كنا له مقرنين، وإنا إلى ربنا لمنقلبون. اللهم إنا نسألك في سفرنا هذا البر والتقوى، ومن العمل ما ترضى

duas.arabic: آيِبُونَ تَائِبُونَ عَابِدُونَ لِرَبِّنَا حَامِدُونَ
duas.transliteration: Ayibuna, ta'ibuna, 'abiduna, li-Rabbina hamidun
duas.translation_en: We are returning, repenting, worshipping, and praising our Lord.
duas.translation_ar: آيبون تائبون عابدون لربنا حامدون

duas.arabic: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ، لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ، يُحْيِي وَيُمِيتُ، وَهُوَ حَيٌّ لَا يَمُوتُ، بِيَدِهِ الْخَيْرُ، وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
duas.transliteration: La ilaha illallahu wahdahu la sharika lah, lahul-mulku wa lahul-hamdu, yuhyi wa yumitu, wa huwa hayyun la yamutu, biyadihil-khayru, wa huwa 'ala kulli shay'in qadir
duas.translation_en: None has the right to be worshipped except Allah alone, without partner. To Him belongs all sovereignty and praise. He gives life and causes death, and He is living and does not die. In His hand is all good, and He is over all things competent.
duas.translation_ar: لا إله إلا الله وحده لا شريك له، له الملك وله الحمد، يحيي ويميت، وهو حي لا يموت، بيده الخير، وهو على كل شيء قدير

duas.arabic: لَا بَأْسَ طَهُورٌ إِنْ شَاءَ اللَّهُ
duas.transliteration: La ba'sa tahurun in sha' Allah
duas.translation_en: No harm, (it will be) a purification (for you), if Allah wills.
duas.translation_ar: لا بأس طهور إن شاء الله

duas.arabic: سُبْحَانَ الَّذِي يُسَبِّحُ الرَّعْدُ بِحَمْدِهِ وَالْمَلَائِكَةُ مِنْ خِيفَتِهِ
duas.transliteration: Subhanal-ladhi yusabbihur-ra'du bihamdihi wal-mala'ikatu min khifati
duas.translation_en: Glory be to Him whom thunder glorifies with His praise, and the angels as well, from His awe.
duas.translation_ar: سبحان الذي يسبح الرعد بحمده والملائكة من خيفته

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ خَيْرَهَا وَخَيْرَ مَا فِيهَا وَخَيْرَ مَا أُرْسِلَتْ بِهِ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّهَا وَشَرِّ مَا فِيهَا وَشَرِّ مَا أُرْسِلَتْ بِهِ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inni as'aluka khayraha wa khayra ma fiha wa khayra ma ursilat bihi, wa a'udhu bika min sharriha wa sharri ma fiha wa sharri ma ursilat bihi
duas.translation_en: O Allah, I ask You for the good of it, the good within it, and the good it was sent with. And I seek refuge with You from the evil of it, the evil within it, and the evil it was sent with.
duas.translation_ar: اللهم إني أسألك خيرها وخير ما فيها وخير ما أرسلت به، وأعوذ بك من شرها وشر ما فيها وشر ما أرسلت به

duas.arabic: اللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ، سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ، الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ، لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ
duas.transliteration: Allahu Akbar, Subhanallah, Alhamdulillah, La ilaha illallah
duas.translation_en: Allah is the Greatest, Glory be to Allah, Praise be to Allah, None has the right to be worshipped except Allah.
duas.translation_ar: الله أكبر، سبحان الله، الحمد لله، لا إله إلا الله

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْتَخِيرُكَ بِعِلْمِكَ وَأَسْتَقْدِرُكَ بِقُدْرَتِكَ وَأَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ فَضْلِكَ الْعَظِيمِ، فَإِنَّكَ تَقْدِرُ وَلَا أَقْدِرُ وَتَعْلَمُ وَلَا أَعْلَمُ وَأَنْتَ عَلَّامُ الْغُيُوبِ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inni astakhiruka bi'ilmika wa astaqdiruka biqudratika wa as'aluka min fadlikal-'azim, fa innaka taqdiru wa la aqdiru wa ta'lamu wa la a'lamu wa anta 'allamul-ghuyub
duas.translation_en: O Allah, I seek Your guidance by virtue of Your knowledge, and I seek ability by virtue of Your power, and I ask You of Your great bounty. You have power, I have none. You know, I know not. You are the Knower of the unseen.
duas.translation_ar: اللهم إني أستخيرك بعلمك وأستقدرك بقدرتك وأسألك من فضلك العظيم، فإنك تقدر ولا أقدر وتعلم ولا أعلم وأنت علام الغيوب

duas.title_en: Dua When Rain Falls After Drought
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَيِّبًا هَنِيئًا وَسَيْبًا مَرِيئًا
duas.transliteration: Allahumma sayyiban hani'an wa sayban mari'an
duas.translation_en: O Allah, (make it) a wholesome and pleasant rainfall.
duas.translation_ar: اللهم صيبًا هنيئًا وسيبًا مريئًا

duas.title_en: Dua Upon Seeing the Crescent Moon
duas.arabic: اللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ، اللَّهُمَّ أَهِلَّهُ عَلَيْنَا بِالْأَمْنِ وَالْإِيمَانِ وَالسَّلَامَةِ وَالْإِسْلَامِ، وَالتَّوْفِيقِ لِمَا تُحِبُّ وَتَرْضَى، رَبُّنَا وَرَبُّكَ اللَّهُ
duas.transliteration: Allahu Akbar, Allahumma ahillahu 'alayna bil-amni wal-imani was-salamati wal-Islam, wat-tawfiqi lima tuhibbu wa tarda, Rabbuna wa Rabbukallah
duas.translation_en: Allah is the Greatest. O Allah, bring it over us with safety, faith, security, Islam, and success in what You love and are pleased with. Our Lord and your Lord is Allah.
duas.translation_ar: الله أكبر، اللهم أهله علينا بالأمن والإيمان والسلامة والإسلام، والتوفيق لما تحب وترضى، ربنا وربك الله

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ رَحْمَةً مِنْ عِنْدِكَ تَهْدِي بِهَا قَلْبِي، وَتَجْمَعُ بِهَا أَمْرِي، وَتَلُمُّ بِهَا شَعَثِي
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inni as'aluka rahmatan min 'indika tahdi biha qalbi, wa tajma'u biha amri, wa talummu biha sha'athi
duas.translation_en: O Allah, I ask You for mercy from Yourself by which You guide my heart, bring together my affairs, and mend my brokenness.
duas.translation_ar: اللهم إني أسألك رحمة من عندك تهدي بها قلبي، وتجمع بها أمري، وتلم بها شعثي

duas.arabic: سَجَدَ وَجْهِي لِلَّذِي خَلَقَهُ وَصَوَّرَهُ وَشَقَّ سَمْعَهُ وَبَصَرَهُ، تَبَارَكَ اللَّهُ أَحْسَنُ الْخَالِقِينَ
duas.transliteration: Sajada wajhiya lilladhi khalaqahu wa sawwarahu wa shaqqa sam'ahu wa basarahu, tabarakallahu ahsanul-khaliqin
duas.translation_en: My face has prostrated to the One who created it, formed it, and granted it hearing and sight. Blessed is Allah, the Best of creators.
duas.translation_ar: سجد وجهي للذي خلقه وصوره وشق سمعه وبصره، تبارك الله أحسن الخالقين

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَعِنِّي عَلَى ذِكْرِكَ وَشُكْرِكَ وَحُسْنِ عِبَادَتِكَ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma a'innee 'ala dhikrika wa shukrika wa husni 'ibadatik
duas.translation_en: O Allah, help me to remember You, to be grateful to You, and to worship You in an excellent manner.
duas.translation_ar: اللهم أعني على ذكرك وشكرك وحسن عبادتك

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي عَبْدُكَ ابْنُ عَبْدِكَ ابْنُ أَمَتِكَ، نَاصِيَتِي بِيَدِكَ، مَاضٍ فِيَّ حُكْمُكَ، عَدْلٌ فِيَّ قَضَاؤُكَ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inni 'abduka, ibnu 'abdika, ibnu amatika, nasiyati biyadika, madin fiyya hukmuka, 'adlun fiyya qada'uka
duas.translation_en: O Allah, I am Your servant, son of Your servant, son of Your maidservant. My forelock is in Your hand, Your command over me is forever executed, and Your decree over me is just.
duas.translation_ar: اللهم إني عبدك ابن عبدك ابن أمتك، ناصيتي بيدك، ماض في حكمك، عدل في قضاؤك

duas.arabic: سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ
duas.transliteration: Subhanallah
duas.translation_en: Glory be to Allah.
duas.translation_ar: سبحان الله

duas.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ
duas.transliteration: Alhamdulillah
duas.translation_en: All praise is for Allah.
duas.translation_ar: الحمد لله

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اسْقِنَا غَيْثًا مُغِيثًا مَرِيئًا مَرِيعًا، نَافِعًا غَيْرَ ضَارٍّ، عَاجِلًا غَيْرَ آجِلٍ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma asqina ghaythan mughithan mari'an mari'an, nafi'an ghayra darrin, 'ajilan ghayra ajil
duas.translation_en: O Allah, give us refreshing rain, beneficial, wholesome, fruitful, plentiful, beneficial not harmful, now not delayed.
duas.translation_ar: اللهم اسقنا غيثًا مغيثًا مريئًا مريعًا، نافعًا غير ضار، عاجلاً غير آجل

duas.arabic: آمَنْتُ بِاللَّهِ وَرُسُلِهِ
duas.transliteration: Aman-tu billahi wa rusulihi
duas.translation_en: I believe in Allah and His messengers.
duas.translation_ar: آمنت بالله ورسله

duas.arabic: إِنَّا لِلَّهِ وَإِنَّا إِلَيْهِ رَاجِعُونَ، اللَّهُمَّ أْجُرْنِي فِي مُصِيبَتِي وَأَخْلِفْ لِي خَيْرًا مِنْهَا
duas.transliteration: Inna lillahi wa inna ilayhi raji'un. Allahumma ajurni fi musibati wakhluf li khayran minha
duas.translation_en: To Allah we belong and to Him we shall return. O Allah, reward me for my calamity and compensate me with something better than it.
duas.translation_ar: إنا لله وإنا إليه راجعون، اللهم أجرني في مصيبتي وأخلف لي خيرًا منها

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ بِعِلْمِكَ الْغَيْبَ وَقُدْرَتِكَ عَلَى الْخَلْقِ أَحْيِنِي مَا عَلِمْتَ الْحَيَاةَ خَيْرًا لِي، وَتَوَفَّنِي إِذَا عَلِمْتَ الْوَفَاةَ خَيْرًا لِي
duas.transliteration: Allahumma bi'ilmikal-ghayba wa qudratika 'alal-khalqi ahyini ma 'alimtal-hayata khayran li, wa tawaffani idha 'alimtal-wafata khayran li
duas.translation_en: O Allah, by Your knowledge of the unseen and Your power over creation, keep me alive as long as You know life is good for me, and cause me to die when You know death is good for me.
duas.translation_ar: اللهم بعلمك الغيب وقدرتك على الخلق أحييني ما علمت الحياة خيرًا لي، وتوفني إذا علمت الوفاة خيرًا لي

duas.arabic: ذَهَبَ الظَّمَأُ وَابْتَلَّتِ الْعُرُوقُ وَثَبَتَ الْأَجْرُ إِنْ شَاءَ اللَّهُ
duas.transliteration: Dhahabadh-dhama'u wabtallatil-'uruqu wa thabatal-ajru in sha' Allah
duas.translation_en: Thirst has gone, the veins are moistened, and the reward is confirmed, if Allah wills.
duas.translation_ar: ذهب الظمأ وابتلت العروق وثبت الأجر إن شاء الله

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنَّكَ عَفُوٌّ تُحِبُّ الْعَفْوَ فَاعْفُ عَنِّي
duas.transliteration: Allahumma innaka 'afuwwun tuhibbul-'afwa fa'fu 'anni
duas.translation_en: O Allah, You are Forgiving and love forgiveness, so forgive me.
duas.translation_ar: اللهم إنك عفو تحب العفو فاعف عني

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لَهُ وَارْحَمْهُ وَعَافِهِ وَاعْفُ عَنْهُ، وَأَكْرِمْ نُزُلَهُ وَوَسِّعْ مُدْخَلَهُ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma-ghfir lahu warhamhu wa 'afihi wa'fu 'anhu, wa akrim nuzulahu wa wassi' mudkhalahu
duas.translation_en: O Allah, forgive him, have mercy on him, grant him well-being, pardon him, honor his resting place, and expand his entry.
duas.translation_ar: اللهم اغفر له وارحمه وعافه واعف عنه، وأكرم نزله ووسع مدخله

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِي وَارْحَمْنِي وَاهْدِنِي وَعَافِنِي وَارْزُقْنِي
duas.transliteration: Allahumma-ghfir li warhamni wahdini wa 'afini warzuqni
duas.translation_en: O Allah, forgive me, have mercy on me, guide me, grant me well-being, and provide for me.
duas.translation_ar: اللهم اغفر لي وارحمني واهدني وعافني وارزقني

duas.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي بِنِعْمَتِهِ تَتِمُّ الصَّالِحَاتُ
duas.transliteration: Alhamdu lillahil-ladhi bi ni'matihi tatimmus-salihat
duas.translation_en: All praise is for Allah by whose favor good deeds are completed.
duas.translation_ar: الحمد لله الذي بنعمته تتم الصالحات

duas.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ عَلَى كُلِّ حَالٍ
duas.transliteration: Alhamdu lillahi 'ala kulli hal
duas.translation_en: All praise is for Allah in all circumstances.
duas.translation_ar: الحمد لله على كل حال

duas.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي عَافَانِي مِمَّا ابْتَلَاكَ بِهِ، وَفَضَّلَنِي عَلَى كَثِيرٍ مِمَّنْ خَلَقَ تَفْضِيلًا
duas.transliteration: Alhamdu lillahil-ladhi 'afani mimmabtalaka bihi, wa faddalani 'ala kathirin mimman khalaqa tafdila
duas.translation_en: All praise is for Allah who saved me from what He has afflicted you with, and favored me greatly above much of His creation.
duas.translation_ar: الحمد لله الذي عافاني مما ابتلاك به، وفضلني على كثير ممن خلق تفضيلاً

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اكْفِنِي بِحَلَالِكَ عَنْ حَرَامِكَ، وَأَغْنِنِي بِفَضْلِكَ عَمَّنْ سِوَاكَ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma-kfini bi halalika 'an haramika, wa aghnini bi fadlika 'amman siwak
duas.translation_en: O Allah, suffice me with what You have permitted instead of what You have forbidden, and make me independent of all others by Your bounty.
duas.translation_ar: اللهم اكفني بحلالك عن حرامك، وأغنني بفضلك عمن سواك

duas.title_ar: دعاء عند الاستيقاظ من النوم ليلاً
duas.title_en: Dua When Waking Up at Night
duas.arabic: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ، لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ، وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ. الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ، وَسُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ، وَلَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ، وَاللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ، وَلَا حَوْلَ وَلَا قُوَّةَ إِلَّا بِاللَّهِ
duas.transliteration: La ilaha illallahu wahdahu la sharika lah, lahul-mulku wa lahul-hamdu, wa huwa 'ala kulli shay'in qadir. Alhamdu lillah, wa subhanallah, wa la ilaha illallah, wallahu akbar, wa la hawla wa la quwwata illa billah
duas.translation_en: None has the right to be worshipped except Allah alone, without partner. To Him belongs all sovereignty and praise, and He is over all things competent. Praise be to Allah, glory be to Allah, none has the right to be worshipped except Allah, Allah is the Greatest, and there is no might nor power except with Allah.
duas.translation_ar: لا إله إلا الله وحده لا شريك له، له الملك وله الحمد، وهو على كل شيء قدير. الحمد لله، وسبحان الله، ولا إله إلا الله، والله أكبر، ولا حول ولا قوة إلا بالله

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ رَبَّ هَذِهِ الدَّعْوَةِ التَّامَّةِ، وَالصَّلَاةِ الْقَائِمَةِ، آتِ مُحَمَّدًا الْوَسِيلَةَ وَالْفَضِيلَةَ، وَابْعَثْهُ مَقَامًا مَحْمُودًا الَّذِي وَعَدْتَهُ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma rabba hadhid-da'watit-tammah, was-salatil-qa'imah, ati Muhammadan al-wasilata wal-fadilah, wab'athhu maqaman mahmudan alladhi wa'adtah
duas.translation_en: O Allah, Lord of this perfect call and the prayer to be established, grant Muhammad the Wasilah (a station in Paradise) and superiority, and raise him to a praiseworthy position which You have promised him.
duas.translation_ar: اللهم رب هذه الدعوة التامة، والصلاة القائمة، آت محمدًا الوسيلة والفضيلة، وابعثه مقامًا محمودًا الذي وعدته

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْعَفْوَ وَالْعَافِيَةَ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inni as'alukal-'afwa wal-'afiyah fid-dunya wal-akhirah
duas.translation_en: O Allah, I ask You for pardon and well-being in this world and the Hereafter.
duas.translation_ar: اللهم إني أسألك العفو والعافية في الدنيا والآخرة

duas.arabic: سُبْحَانَ رَبِّيَ الْعَظِيمِ
duas.transliteration: Subhana rabbiyal-'azim
duas.translation_en: Glory be to my Lord, the Magnificent.
duas.translation_ar: سبحان ربي العظيم

duas.arabic: سُبْحَانَ رَبِّيَ الْأَعْلَى
duas.transliteration: Subhana rabbiyal-a'la
duas.translation_en: Glory be to my Lord, the Most High.
duas.translation_ar: سبحان ربي الأعلى

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ عَذَابِ جَهَنَّمَ، وَمِنْ عَذَابِ الْقَبْرِ، وَمِنْ فِتْنَةِ الْمَحْيَا وَالْمَمَاتِ، وَمِنْ شَرِّ فِتْنَةِ الْمَسِيحِ الدَّجَّالِ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inni a'udhu bika min 'adhabi jahannam, wa min 'adhabil-qabr, wa min fitnatil-mahya wal-mamat, wa min sharri fitnatil-masihid-dajjal
duas.translation_en: O Allah, I seek refuge with You from the punishment of Hell, from the punishment of the grave, from the trials of life and death, and from the evil of the trial of the Antichrist.
duas.translation_ar: اللهم إني أعوذ بك من عذاب جهنم، ومن عذاب القبر، ومن فتنة المحيا والممات، ومن شر فتنة المسيح الدجال

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنَّا نَسْتَعِينُكَ وَنَسْتَغْفِرُكَ وَنُؤْمِنُ بِكَ وَنَتَوَكَّلُ عَلَيْكَ وَنُثْنِي عَلَيْكَ الْخَيْرَ كُلَّهُ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inna nasta'inuka wa nastaghfiruka wa nu'minu bika wa natawakkalu 'alayka wa nuthni 'alaykal-khayra kullahu
duas.translation_en: O Allah, we seek Your help, ask Your forgiveness, believe in You, rely on You, and praise You for all goodness.
duas.translation_ar: اللهم إنا نستعينك ونستغفرك ونؤمن بك ونتوكل عليك ونثني عليك الخير كله

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اسْقِنَا غَيْثًا مُغِيثًا، مَرِيئًا مَرِيعًا، نَافِعًا غَيْرَ ضَارٍّ، عَاجِلًا غَيْرَ آجِلٍ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma asqina ghaythan mughithan, mari'an mari'an, nafi'an ghayra darrin, 'ajilan ghayra ajil
duas.translation_en: O Allah, give us refreshing rain, wholesome, fruitful, beneficial not harmful, now not delayed.
duas.translation_ar: اللهم اسقنا غيثًا مغيثًا، مريئًا مريعًا، نافعًا غير ضار، عاجلاً غير آجل

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنَّا نَجْعَلُكَ فِي نُحُورِهِمْ، وَنَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شُرُورِهِمْ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inna naj'aluka fi nuhurihim, wa na'udhu bika min shururihim
duas.translation_en: O Allah, we place You in their throats (to repel them), and we seek refuge in You from their evil.
duas.translation_ar: اللهم إنا نجعلك في نحورهم، ونعوذ بك من شرورهم

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ مُنْزِلَ الْكِتَابِ، سَرِيعَ الْحِسَابِ، اهْزِمِ الْأَحْزَابَ، اللَّهُمَّ اهْزِمْهُمْ وَزَلْزِلْهُمْ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma munzilal-kitabi, sari'al-hisabi, ihzimil-ahzaba, Allahumma ihzimhum wa zalzilhum
duas.translation_en: O Allah, Revealer of the Book, Swift in reckoning, defeat the confederates. O Allah, defeat them and shake them.
duas.translation_ar: اللهم منزل الكتاب، سريع الحساب، اهزم الأحزاب، اللهم اهزمهم وزلزلهم

duas.arabic: مُطِرْنَا بِفَضْلِ اللَّهِ وَرَحْمَتِهِ
duas.transliteration: Mutirna bi fadhlillahi wa rahmatihi
duas.translation_en: We have received rain by the grace and mercy of Allah.
duas.translation_ar: مطرنا بفضل الله ورحمته

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ خَيْرَهَا، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّهَا
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inni as'aluka khayraha, wa a'udhu bika min sharriha
duas.translation_en: O Allah, I ask You for its good, and I seek refuge with You from its evil.
duas.translation_ar: اللهم إني أسألك خيرها، وأعوذ بك من شرها

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ لَا تَقْتُلْنَا بِغَضَبِكَ، وَلَا تُهْلِكْنَا بِعَذَابِكَ، وَعَافِنَا قَبْلَ ذَلِكَ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma la taqtulna bighadhabika, wa la tuhlikna bi'adhabika, wa 'afina qabla dhalik
duas.translation_en: O Allah, do not kill us with Your wrath, do not destroy us with Your punishment, and pardon us before that.
duas.translation_ar: اللهم لا تقتلنا بغضبك، ولا تهلكنا بعذابك، وعافنا قبل ذلك

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْخُبُثِ وَالْخَبَائِثِ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inni a'udhu bika minal-khubuthi wal-khaba'ith
duas.translation_en: O Allah, I seek refuge with You from male and female devils.
duas.translation_ar: اللهم إني أعوذ بك من الخبث والخبائث

duas.arabic: غُفْرَانَكَ
duas.transliteration: Ghufranak
duas.translation_en: I seek Your forgiveness.
duas.translation_ar: غفرانك

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِي ذَنْبِي، وَوَسِّعْ لِي فِي دَارِي، وَبَارِكْ لِي فِي رِزْقِي
duas.transliteration: Allahumma-ghfir li dhanbi, wa wassi' li fi dari, wa barik li fi rizqi
duas.translation_en: O Allah, forgive my sin, expand my home for me, and bless my provision for me.
duas.translation_ar: اللهم اغفر لي ذنبي، ووسع لي في داري، وبارك لي في رزقي

duas.arabic: أَشْهَدُ أَنْ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ، وَأَشْهَدُ أَنَّ مُحَمَّدًا عَبْدُهُ وَرَسُولُهُ
duas.transliteration: Ashhadu an la ilaha illallahu wahdahu la sharika lah, wa ashhadu anna Muhammadan 'abduhu wa rasuluh
duas.translation_en: I bear witness that none has the right to be worshipped except Allah alone, without partner, and I bear witness that Muhammad is His servant and Messenger.
duas.translation_ar: أشهد أن لا إله إلا الله وحده لا شريك له، وأشهد أن محمدًا عبده ورسوله

duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ، وَاللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ، اللَّهُمَّ هَذَا مِنْكَ وَلَكَ، هَذَا عَنِّي
duas.transliteration: Bismillah, wallahu akbar. Allahumma hadha minka wa laka, hadha 'anni
duas.translation_en: In the name of Allah, Allah is the Greatest. O Allah, this is from You and for You. This is on my behalf.
duas.translation_ar: بسم الله، والله أكبر، اللهم هذا منك ولك، هذا عني

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ بَارِكْ لَنَا فِي ثَمَرِنَا، وَبَارِكْ لَنَا فِي مَدِينَتِنَا، وَبَارِكْ لَنَا فِي صَاعِنَا، وَبَارِكْ لَنَا فِي مُدِّنَا
duas.transliteration: Allahumma barik lana fi thamarina, wa barik lana fi madinatina, wa barik lana fi sa'ina, wa barik lana fi muddina
duas.translation_en: O Allah, bless our fruits for us, bless our city for us, bless our measures for us, and bless our weights for us.
duas.translation_ar: اللهم بارك لنا في ثمرنا، وبارك لنا في مدينتنا، وبارك لنا في صاعنا، وبارك لنا في مدنا

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ فَضْلِكَ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inni as'aluka min fadlik
duas.translation_en: O Allah, I ask You from Your bounty.
duas.translation_ar: اللهم إني أسألك من فضلك

duas.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ اللَّهُمَّ وَبِحَمْدِكَ وَتَبَارَكَ اسْمُكَ وَتَعَالَى جَدُّكَ وَلَا إِلَهَ غَيْرُكَ
duas.transliteration: Subhanaka Allahumma wa bihamdika wa tabarakasmuka wa ta'ala jadduka wa la ilaha ghayruk
duas.translation_en: Glory is to You O Allah and praise, blessed is Your name and exalted is Your majesty, and none has the right to be worshipped but You.
duas.translation_ar: سبحانك اللهم وبحمدك وتبارك اسمك وتعالى جدك ولا إله غيرك

duas.arabic: رَبَّنَا وَلَكَ الْحَمْدُ
duas.transliteration: Rabbana wa lakal-hamd
duas.translation_en: Our Lord, to You belongs all praise.
duas.translation_ar: ربنا ولك الحمد

duas.arabic: التَّحِيَّاتُ لِلَّهِ وَالصَّلَوَاتُ وَالطَّيِّبَاتُ...
duas.transliteration: At-tahiyyatu lillahi was-salawatu wat-tayyibat...
duas.translation_en: All greetings, prayers and pure words are for Allah...
duas.translation_ar: التحيات لله والصلوات والطيبات...

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْهَمِّ وَالْحَزَنِ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inni a'udhu bika minal-hammi wal-hazan
duas.translation_en: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from worry and sadness.
duas.translation_ar: اللهم إني أعوذ بك من الهم والحزن

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اكْفِنِي بِحَلَالِكَ عَنْ حَرَامِكَ وَأَغْنِنِي بِفَضْلِكَ عَمَّنْ سِوَاكَ
duas.transliteration: Allahummakfini bihalalika 'an haramika wa aghnini bifadlika 'amman siwak
duas.translation_en: O Allah, suffice me with what You made lawful instead of what You made unlawful, and enrich me by Your bounty from all others.
duas.translation_ar: اللهم اكفني بحلالك عن حرامك وأغنني بفضلك عمن سواك

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْتَخِيرُكَ بِعِلْمِكَ...
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inni astakhiruka bi'ilmik...
duas.translation_en: O Allah, I seek Your guidance by Your knowledge...
duas.translation_ar: اللهم إني أستخيرك بعلمك...

duas.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي أَحْيَانَا بَعْدَ مَا أَمَاتَنَا
duas.transliteration: Alhamdu lillahil-ladhi ahyana ba'da ma amatana
duas.translation_en: Praise be to Allah who gave us life after causing us to die.
duas.translation_ar: الحمد لله الذي أحيانا بعد ما أماتنا

duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ تَوَكَّلْتُ عَلَى اللَّهِ
duas.transliteration: Bismillah tawakkaltu 'ala Allah
duas.translation_en: In the name of Allah, I place my trust in Allah.
duas.translation_ar: بسم الله توكلت على الله

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ خَيْرَ الْمَوْلِجِ وَخَيْرَ الْمَخْرَجِ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inni as'aluka khayral-mawliji wa khayral-makhraj
duas.translation_en: O Allah, I ask You for the best entrance and the best exit.
duas.translation_ar: اللهم إني أسألك خير المولج وخير المخرج

duas.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي عَافَانِي مِمَّا ابْتَلَاكَ بِهِ
duas.transliteration: Alhamdu lillahil-ladhi 'afani mimma ibtalaka bih
duas.translation_en: Praise be to Allah who has spared me from what He has afflicted you with.
duas.translation_ar: الحمد لله الذي عافاني مما ابتلاك به

duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ خَيْرَهَا
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inni as'aluka khayraha
duas.translation_en: O Allah, I ask You for its goodness.
duas.translation_ar: اللهم إني أسألك خيرها

duas.arabic: سُبْحَٰنَهُۥ وَتَعَٰلَىٰ
duas.transliteration: ). It aims to help increase iman, give hope and relief to the distressed, and save the supplicant from despair and isolation. Here we provided all 267 du'as in this book to be read online in Arabic text, and included English Translation and Transliteration. Insha-Allah, our aim is to make the Hisnul Muslim du'a book even more accessible with our mobile app.
duas.translation_en: Chapter 1: When waking up
duas.translation_ar: سُبْحَٰنَهُۥ وَتَعَٰلَىٰ

duas.arabic: الحَمْـدُ لِلّهِ الّذي أَحْـيانا بَعْـدَ ما أَماتَـنا وَإليه النُّـشور
duas.transliteration: Alḥamdu lillāhil-ladhī 'aḥyānāba`da mā 'amātanāwa 'ilayhin-nushūr.
duas.translation_en: Praise is to Allah Who gives us life after He has caused us to die and to Him is the return.
duas.translation_ar: الحَمْـدُ لِلّهِ الّذي أَحْـيانا بَعْـدَ ما أَماتَـنا وَإليه النُّـشور

duas.arabic: لا إلهَ إلاّ اللّهُ وَحْـدَهُ لا شَـريكَ له لهُ المُلـكُ ولهُ الحَمـد وهوَ على كلّ شيءٍ قدير سُـبْحانَ اللهِ والحمْـدُ لله ولا إلهَ إلاّ اللهُ واللهُ أكبَر وَلا حَولَ وَلا قوّة إلاّ باللّهِ العليّ العظيم رَبِّ اغْفرْ لي
duas.transliteration: Lā 'ilāha 'illallāhu waḥdahu la sharīka lahu. lahul-mulku wa lahul-ḥamdu. wa huwa 'alā kulli shay'in qadīrSubḥānallāhi, walḥamdu lillāhi. wa lā 'ilāha 'illallāhu, wallāhu 'akbar. wa lā ḥaula wa lā quwwata 'illā billāhil-`aliyyil-`aẓīm. rabbighfir lī.
duas.translation_en: There is none worthy of worship but Allah alone, Who has no partner, His is the dominion and to Him belongs all praise, and He is able to do all things. Glory is to Allah. Praise is to Allah. There is none worthy of worship but Allah. Allah is the Most Great. There is no might and no power except by Allah's leave, the Exalted, the Mighty. My Lord, forgive me.
duas.translation_ar: لا إلهَ إلاّ اللّهُ وَحْـدَهُ لا شَـريكَ له لهُ المُلـكُ ولهُ الحَمـد وهوَ على كلّ شيءٍ قدير سُـبْحانَ اللهِ والحمْـدُ لله ولا إلهَ إلاّ اللهُ واللهُ أكبَر وَلا حَولَ وَلا قوّة إلاّ باللّهِ العليّ العظيم رَبِّ اغْفرْ لي

duas.arabic: الحمدُ للهِ الذي عافاني في جَسَدي وَرَدّ عَليّ روحي وَأَذِنَ لي بِذِكْرِه
duas.transliteration: Al-ḥamdu lillāhil-ladhī`āfānī fī jasadī. wa radda `alayya rūḥī. wa 'adhina lī bidhikrihi.
duas.translation_en: Praise is to Allah who gave strength to my body and returned my soul to me and permitted me to remember Him.
duas.translation_ar: الحمدُ للهِ الذي عافاني في جَسَدي وَرَدّ عَليّ روحي وَأَذِنَ لي بِذِكْرِه

duas.arabic: يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ ءامَنُواْ اصْبِرُواْ وَصَابِرُواْ وَرَابِطُواْ وَاتَّقُواْ اللهَ لَعَلَّكُمْ تُفْلِحُونَ
duas.transliteration: Inna fī khalqi-ssamāwāti wal-'arđi wakhtilāfi-llayli wan-nahāri la'āyātin li'wlī-l-'albāb. Al-ladhīna yadhkurūna-allaha qiyāman wa qu`ūdan wa `alā junūbihim wa yatafakkarūna fī Khalqi-ssamāwāti wal-'arđi rabbanā mā khalaqta hādhā bāţilāan subĥānaka faqinā `adhāban-nār. Rabbanā 'innaka man tudkhili-nnāra faqad 'akhzaytahu wa mā li-žžālimīna min 'anşārin. Rabbanā 'innanā sami`nā munādīan yunādī lil'īmāni 'an 'āminū birabbikum fa 'āmannā. Rabbanā fāghfirlanā dhunūbanā wa kaffir `annā sayyi'ātinā wa tawaffanā ma`a al-'abrāri. Rabbanā wa 'ātinā mā wa`adtanā `alá rusulika wa lā tukhzinā yawmal-qiyāmati 'innaka lā tukhliful-mī`ād. Fāstajāba lahum rabbuhum 'annī lā 'uđī`u `amala `āmilin minkum min dhakarin 'aw 'unthá ba`đukum min ba`đin fa-lladhīna hājarū wa 'ukhrijū min diyārihim wa 'ūdhū fī sabīlī wa qātalū wa qutilū la'ukaffiranna `anhum sayyi'ātihim wa la'udkhilannahum jannātin tajrī min taĥtihāl-'anhāru thawāban min `indil-lahi wal-lāhu `indahu ĥusnuth-thawāb. Lā yaghurrannaka taqallubu 'l-ladhīna kafarū fī l-bilādi. Matā`un qalīlun thumma ma'wāhum jahannamu wa bi'sa 'l-mihād. Lakini 'l-ladhīna 'ttaqaw rabbahum lahum jannātun tajrī min taĥtihā 'l-'anhāru khālidīna fīhā nuzulan min `indi 'l-lahi wa mā `inda 'llahi khayrun li 'l-abrār. Wa 'inna min 'ahli 'l-kitābi laman yu'minu bil-lahi wa mā 'unzila 'ilaykum wa mā 'unzila 'ilayhim khāshi`īna lillahi lā yashtarūna bi'āyāti 'l-lahi thamanan qalīlāan 'ulā'ika lahum 'ajruhum `inda rabbihim 'inna 'l-laha sarī`u al-ĥisāb. Yā 'ayyuhā 'l-ladhīna 'āmanū-şbirū wa şābirū wa rābiţū wa 'ttaqu 'l-laha la`allakum tufliĥūn.
duas.translation_en: Indeed, in the creation of the heavens and the earth and the alternation of the day and night there are signs for people of reason.˹They are˺ those who remember Allah while standing, sitting, and lying on their sides, and reflect on the creation of the heavens and the earth ˹and pray˺, “Our Lord! You have not created ˹all of˺ this without purpose. Glory be to You! Protect us from the torment of the Fire. Our Lord! Indeed, those You commit to the Fire will be ˹completely˺ disgraced! And the wrongdoers will have no helpers. Our Lord! We have heard the caller to ˹true˺ belief, ˹proclaiming,˺ ‘Believe in your Lord ˹alone˺,’ so we believed. Our Lord! Forgive our sins, absolve us of our misdeeds, and allow us ˹each˺ to die as one of the virtuous. Our Lord! Grant us what You have promised us through Your messengers and do not put us to shame on Judgment Day—for certainly You never fail in Your promise.”So their Lord responded to them: “I will never deny any of you—male or female—the reward of your deeds. Both are equal in reward. Those who migrated or were expelled from their homes, and were persecuted for My sake and fought and ˹some˺ were martyred—I will certainly forgive their sins and admit them into Gardens under which rivers flow, as a reward from Allah. And with Allah is the finest reward!”Do not be deceived by the prosperity of the disbelievers throughout the land. It is only a brief enjoyment. Then Hell will be their home—what an evil place to rest! But those who are mindful of their Lord will be in Gardens under which rivers flow, to stay there forever—as an accommodation from Allah. And what is with Allah is best for the virtuous. Indeed, there are some among the People of the Book who truly believe in Allah and what has been revealed to you ˹believers˺ and what was revealed to them. They humble themselves before Allah—never trading Allah’s revelations for a fleeting gain. Their reward is with their Lord. Surely Allah is swift in reckoning. O believers! Patiently endure, persevere, stand on guard, and be mindful of Allah, so you may be successful.
duas.translation_ar: يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ ءامَنُواْ اصْبِرُواْ وَصَابِرُواْ وَرَابِطُواْ وَاتَّقُواْ اللهَ لَعَلَّكُمْ تُفْلِحُونَ

duas.arabic: وَرَزَقَنيه مِنْ غَـيـْرِ حَولٍ مِنّي وَلا قـوّة
duas.transliteration: Alḥamdu lillāhil-ladhī kasānī hādhā (aththawba) wa razaqanīhi min ghayri hawlim-minnī wa lā quwwah.
duas.translation_en: Praise is to Allah Who has clothed me with this (garment) and provided it for me, though I was powerless myself and incapable
duas.translation_ar: وَرَزَقَنيه مِنْ غَـيـْرِ حَولٍ مِنّي وَلا قـوّة

duas.arabic: اللّهُـمَّ لَـكَ الحَـمْـدُ أنْـتَ كَسَـوْتَنيهِ أََسْأََلُـكَ مِـنْ خَـيرِهِ وَخَـيْرِ مَا صُنِعَ لَـه وَأَعوذُ بِكَ مِـنْ شَـرِّهِ وَشَـرِّ مـا صُنِعَ لَـهُ
duas.transliteration: Allāhumma lakal-ḥamdu 'anta kasawtanīhi,'as'aluka min khayrihi wa khayri mā ṣuni`a lahu. wa 'a`oothu bika min sharrihi wa sharri mā ṣuni`a lahu.
duas.translation_en: O Allah, praise is to You. You have clothed me. I ask You for its goodness and the goodness of what it has been made for, and I seek Your protection from the evil of it and the evil of what it has been made for.
duas.translation_ar: اللّهُـمَّ لَـكَ الحَـمْـدُ أنْـتَ كَسَـوْتَنيهِ أََسْأََلُـكَ مِـنْ خَـيرِهِ وَخَـيْرِ مَا صُنِعَ لَـه وَأَعوذُ بِكَ مِـنْ شَـرِّهِ وَشَـرِّ مـا صُنِعَ لَـهُ

duas.arabic: تُبْـلي وَيُـخْلِفُ اللهُ تَعَالى
duas.transliteration: Tublī wa yukhliful-lāhu ta`ālā.
duas.translation_en: May Allah replace it when it is worn out.
duas.translation_ar: تُبْـلي وَيُـخْلِفُ اللهُ تَعَالى

duas.arabic: اِلبَـس جَديـداً وَعِـشْ حَمـيداً وَمُـتْ شهيداً
duas.transliteration: Ilbas jadīdan. wa `ish ḥamīdan. wa mut shahīdan.
duas.translation_en: Put on new clothes, live a praise-worthy life and die as a martyr.
duas.translation_ar: اِلبَـس جَديـداً وَعِـشْ حَمـيداً وَمُـتْ شهيداً

duas.arabic: بِسْمِ الله
duas.transliteration: In the Name of Allah.
duas.translation_en: At-Tirmidhi 2/505, among others. See 'Irwa'ul Ghalil no. 49 and Sahihul-Jami' 3/203
duas.translation_ar: بِسْمِ الله

duas.arabic: اللّهُـمَّ إِنِّـي أَعـوذُ بِـكَ مِـنَ الْخُـبْثِ وَالْخَبائِث
duas.transliteration: [Bismillāhi] Allāhumma 'innī 'a`ūdhu bika minal-khubthi walkhabā'ith.
duas.translation_en: [In the Name of Allah]. O Allah, I seek protection in You from evil and the evil ones (or, from the evil male and female Jinn).
duas.translation_ar: اللّهُـمَّ إِنِّـي أَعـوذُ بِـكَ مِـنَ الْخُـبْثِ وَالْخَبائِث

duas.arabic: أَشْهَدُ أَنْ لا إِلَـهَ إِلاّ اللهُ وَحْدَهُ لا شَريـكَ لَـهُ وَأَشْهَدُأَنَّ مُحَمّـداً عَبْـدُهُ وَرَسـولُـه
duas.transliteration: Ash-hadu 'an lā 'ilāha 'illallāhuwaḥdahu lā sharīka lahuwa 'ash-hadu 'anna Muḥammadan `abduhu wa Rasūluhu.
duas.translation_en: I bear witness that none has the right to be worshipped but Allah alone, Who has no partner; and I bear witness that Muhammad is His slave and His Messenger.
duas.translation_ar: أَشْهَدُ أَنْ لا إِلَـهَ إِلاّ اللهُ وَحْدَهُ لا شَريـكَ لَـهُ وَأَشْهَدُأَنَّ مُحَمّـداً عَبْـدُهُ وَرَسـولُـه

duas.arabic: اللّهُـمَّ اجْعَلنـي مِنَ التَّـوّابينَ وَاجْعَـلْني مِنَ المتَطَهّـرين
duas.transliteration: Allāhummaj`alnī minat-tawwābīnawaj`alnī minal-mutaṭahhirīn.
duas.translation_en: O Allah, make me among those who turn to You in repentance, and make me among those who are purified.
duas.translation_ar: اللّهُـمَّ اجْعَلنـي مِنَ التَّـوّابينَ وَاجْعَـلْني مِنَ المتَطَهّـرين

duas.arabic: سُبْحـانَكَ اللّهُـمَّ وَبِحَمدِك أَشْهَـدُ أَنْ لا إِلهَ إِلاّ أَنْتَ أَسْتَغْفِرُكَ وَأَتوبُ إِلَـيْك
duas.transliteration: Subḥānaka Allāhumma wa biḥamdika,'ash-hadu 'an lā 'ilāha 'illā 'Anta,'astaghfiruka wa 'atūbu 'ilayk.
duas.translation_en: Glory is to You, O Allah, and praise; I bear witness that there is noneworthy of worship but You. I seek Your forgiveness and turn to You inrepentance.
duas.translation_ar: سُبْحـانَكَ اللّهُـمَّ وَبِحَمدِك أَشْهَـدُ أَنْ لا إِلهَ إِلاّ أَنْتَ أَسْتَغْفِرُكَ وَأَتوبُ إِلَـيْك

duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللهِ تَوَكَّلْـتُ عَلى اللهِ وَلا حَوْلَ وَلا قُـوَّةَ إِلاّ بِالله
duas.transliteration: Bismillāhi, tawakkaltu `alallāhi. wa lā ḥawla wa lā quwwata illā billāh.
duas.translation_en: In the Name of Allah, I have placed my trust in Allah, there is no might and no power except by Allah.
duas.translation_ar: بِسْمِ اللهِ تَوَكَّلْـتُ عَلى اللهِ وَلا حَوْلَ وَلا قُـوَّةَ إِلاّ بِالله

duas.arabic: اللّهُـمَّ إِنِّـي أَعـوذُ بِكَ أَنْ أَضِـلَّ أَوْ أُضَـل أَوْ أَزِلَّ أَوْ أُزَل أَوْ أَظْلِـمَ أَوْ أَُظْلَـم أَوْ أَجْهَلَ أَوْ يُـجْهَلَ عَلَـيّ
duas.transliteration: Allāhumma 'innī 'a`ūdhu bika'an 'aḍilla, 'aw 'uḍalla,'aw 'azilla, 'aw 'uzalla,'aw 'aẓlima, 'aw 'uẓlama,'aw 'ajhala 'aw yujhala `alayya.
duas.translation_en: O Allah, I seek refuge in You lest I misguide others, or I am misguided byothers, lest I cause others to err or I am caused to err, lest I abuse others or be abused, and lest I behave foolishly or meet with the foolishness of others.
duas.translation_ar: اللّهُـمَّ إِنِّـي أَعـوذُ بِكَ أَنْ أَضِـلَّ أَوْ أُضَـل أَوْ أَزِلَّ أَوْ أُزَل أَوْ أَظْلِـمَ أَوْ أَُظْلَـم أَوْ أَجْهَلَ أَوْ يُـجْهَلَ عَلَـيّ

duas.arabic: ثم ليسلم على أهله
duas.transliteration: Bismillāhi walajnā. wa bismillāhi kharajnā. wa `ala Rabbinā tawakkalnā
duas.translation_en: In the Name of Allah we enter, in the Name of Allah we leave, and upon our Lord we depend [then say As-Salāmu `Alaykum to those present].
duas.translation_ar: ثم ليسلم على أهله

duas.arabic: وَهَبْ لِي نُوراً عَلَى نُوراً
duas.transliteration: Allāhummaj'al fī qalbī nūran.
duas.translation_en: wa fī lisānī nūran.
duas.translation_ar: وَهَبْ لِي نُوراً عَلَى نُوراً

duas.arabic: اللّهُـمَّ افْتَـحْ لي أَبْوابَ رَحْمَتـِك
duas.transliteration: A`ūdhu billāhi l-`aẓīm. wa bi-wajhihil-karīm. wa sultānihil-qadīm. min ash-shaytānir-rajīm.[Bismillāhi, wassalātu wassalāmu `alā rasūlillāhi.] Allāhummaftaḥ lī 'abwāba raḥmatik.
duas.translation_en: I seek refuge in Almighty Allah, By His Noble Face, By His primordial power, From Satan the outcast.1 [In the Name of Allah, and blessings2 and peace be upon the Messenger of Allah.3 O Allah, open before me the doors of Your mercy.4
duas.translation_ar: اللّهُـمَّ افْتَـحْ لي أَبْوابَ رَحْمَتـِك

duas.arabic: بِسمِ الله وَالصّلاةُ وَالسّلامُ عَلى رَسولِ الله اللّهُـمَّ إِنّـي أَسْأَلُكَ مِـنْ فَضْـلِك اللّهُـمَّ اعصِمْنـي مِنَ الشَّيْـطانِ الرَّجـيم
duas.transliteration: Bismillāhi waṣṣalātu wassalāmu 'alā Rasūlillāhi. Allāhumma 'innī 'as'aluka min faḍlika. Allāhumma`ṣimnī min ash-shaytānir-rajīm.
duas.translation_en: In the Name of Allah, and peace and blessings be upon the Messenger of Allah. O Allah, I ask for Your favor, O Allah, protect me from Satan the outcast.
duas.translation_ar: بِسمِ الله وَالصّلاةُ وَالسّلامُ عَلى رَسولِ الله اللّهُـمَّ إِنّـي أَسْأَلُكَ مِـنْ فَضْـلِك اللّهُـمَّ اعصِمْنـي مِنَ الشَّيْـطانِ الرَّجـيم

duas.arabic: لا حول ولا قوة إلا بالله
duas.transliteration: Lā ḥawla wa lā quwwata 'illā billāh.
duas.translation_en: There is no might and no power except by Allah.
duas.translation_ar: لا حول ولا قوة إلا بالله

duas.arabic: وَأَنا أَشْـهَدُ أَنْ لا إِلـهَ إِلاّ اللهُ وَحْـدَهُ لا شَـريكَ لَـه وَأَنَّ محَمّـداً عَبْـدُهُ وَرَسـولُه رَضيـتُ بِاللهِ رَبَّاً وَبِمُحَمَّـدٍ رَسـولاً وَبِالإِسْلامِ دينَـاً
duas.transliteration: Wa 'anā 'ash-hadu 'an lā 'ilāha 'illallāhuwaḥdahu lā sharīka lahuwa 'anna Muḥammadan 'abduhu wa rasūluhu. raḍītu billāhi rabban. wa bi Muḥammadin rasūlanwa bi 'l-islāmi dīnan.
duas.translation_en: I bear witness that none has the right to be worshipped but Allah alone, Who has no partner, and that Muhammad is His slave and His Messenger. I am pleased with Allah as my Lord, with Muhammad as my Messenger and with Islam as my religion.1 [To be recited in Arabic after the mu'adh-dhin's tashahhud or the words of affirmation of Faith] 2
duas.translation_ar: وَأَنا أَشْـهَدُ أَنْ لا إِلـهَ إِلاّ اللهُ وَحْـدَهُ لا شَـريكَ لَـه وَأَنَّ محَمّـداً عَبْـدُهُ وَرَسـولُه رَضيـتُ بِاللهِ رَبَّاً وَبِمُحَمَّـدٍ رَسـولاً وَبِالإِسْلامِ دينَـاً

duas.arabic: إِنَّـكَ لا تُـخْلِفُ الميـعاد
duas.transliteration: Allāhumma rabba hādhihi 'd-da'wati 't-tāmmahwaṣ-ṣalāti 'l-qā'imah,'āti Muhammadani 'l-wasīlata walfaḍīlata. wab 'ath-hu maqāma 'm-mahmūdani 'l-ladhī wa`adtahu, ['innaka lā tukhliful-mī'ād]
duas.translation_en: O Allah, Lord of this perfect call and established prayer. Grant Muhammad the intercession and favor, and raise him to the honored station You have promised him, [verily You do not neglect promises].
duas.translation_ar: إِنَّـكَ لا تُـخْلِفُ الميـعاد

duas.arabic: يَدْعُو لِنَفسِهِ بَيْنَ الْأَذَانِ وَالْإِقَامَةِ فَإِنَّ الدُّعَاءَ حِينَئِذٍ لاَ يُرَدُّ
duas.transliteration: At-Tirmidhi, Abu Dawud, Ahmed. See Irwaa Al-Ghalil 1/262
duas.translation_en: Hisnul Muslim 26
duas.translation_ar: يَدْعُو لِنَفسِهِ بَيْنَ الْأَذَانِ وَالْإِقَامَةِ فَإِنَّ الدُّعَاءَ حِينَئِذٍ لاَ يُرَدُّ

duas.arabic: اللّهُـمَّ باعِـدْ بَيـني وَبَيْنَ خَطـايايَ كَما باعَدْتَ بَيْنَ المَشْرِقِ وَالمَغْرِبْ اللّهُـمَّ نَقِّنـي مِنْ خَطايايَ كَمـا يُـنَقَّى الثَّـوْبُ الأَبْيَضُ مِنَ الدَّنَسْ اللّهُـمَّ اغْسِلْنـي مِنْ خَطايـايَ بِالثَّلـجِ وَالمـاءِ وَالْبَرَدْ
duas.transliteration: Allāhumma bā'id baynī wa bayna khatāyāyakamā bāa'adta bayn al-mashriqi wal-maghribi. Allāhumma naqqinī min khatāyāyakamā yunaqqa 'th-thawbu 'l-'abyaḍu min ad-danasi. Allāhumma 'ghsilnī min khatāyāya. bi 'th-thalji wal-mā'i wal-barad.
duas.translation_en: O Allah, separate me from my sins as You have separated the East from the West. O Allah, cleanse me of my transgressions as the white garment is cleansed of stains. O Allah, wash away my sins with ice and water and frost.
duas.translation_ar: اللّهُـمَّ باعِـدْ بَيـني وَبَيْنَ خَطـايايَ كَما باعَدْتَ بَيْنَ المَشْرِقِ وَالمَغْرِبْ اللّهُـمَّ نَقِّنـي مِنْ خَطايايَ كَمـا يُـنَقَّى الثَّـوْبُ الأَبْيَضُ مِنَ الدَّنَسْ اللّهُـمَّ اغْسِلْنـي مِنْ خَطايـايَ بِالثَّلـجِ وَالمـاءِ وَالْبَرَدْ

duas.arabic: سُبْـحانَكَ اللّهُـمَّ وَبِحَمْـدِكَ وَتَبارَكَ اسْمُـكَ وَتَعـالى جَـدُّكَ وَلا إِلهَ غَيْرُك
duas.transliteration: Subhānaka Allāhumma wa biḥamdika. wa tabāraka 'smuka. wa ta'ālā jadduka. wa lā 'ilāha ghayruk.
duas.translation_en: Glory is to You O Allah, and praise. Blessed is Your Name and Exalted is Your Majesty. There is none worthy of worship but You
duas.translation_ar: سُبْـحانَكَ اللّهُـمَّ وَبِحَمْـدِكَ وَتَبارَكَ اسْمُـكَ وَتَعـالى جَـدُّكَ وَلا إِلهَ غَيْرُك

duas.arabic: وَجَّهـتُ وَجْهِـيَ لِلَّذي فَطَرَ السَّمـواتِ وَالأَرْضَ حَنـيفَاً وَمـا أَنا مِنَ المشْرِكين إِنَّ صَلاتـي وَنُسُكي وَمَحْـيايَ وَمَماتـي للهِ رَبِّ العالَمين لا شَريـكَ لَهُ وَبِذلكَ أُمِرْتُ وَأَنا مِنَ المسْلِـمين. اللّهُـمَّ أَنْتَ المَلِكُ لا إِلهَ إِلاّ أَنْت أَنْتَ رَبِّـي وَأَنـا عَبْـدُك ظَلَمْـتُ نَفْسـي وَاعْـتَرَفْتُ بِذَنْبـي فَاغْفِرْ لي ذُنوبي جَميعاً إِنَّـه لا يَغْـفِرُ الذُّنـوبَ إلاّ أَنْت. وَاهْدِنـي لأَحْسَنِ الأَخْلاقِ لا يَهْـدي لأَحْسَـنِها إِلاّ أَنْـت وَاصْـرِف عَـنّْي سَيِّئَهـا لا يَصْرِفُ عَـنّْي سَيِّئَهـا إِلاّ أَنْـت لَبَّـيْكَ وَسَعْـدَيْك وَالخَـيْرُ كُلُّـهُ بِيَـدَيْـك وَالشَّرُّ لَيْـسَ إِلَـيْك أَنا بِكَ وَإِلَيْـك تَبـارَكْتَ وَتَعـالَيتَ أَسْتَغْـفِرُكَ وَأَتوبُ إِلَـيك
duas.transliteration: Wajjahtu wajhiya li 'l-ladhî faṭara s-samāwāti wa 'l-arḍa,ḥanīfan wa mā ana min al-mushrikīna. Inna salāti wa nusukī, wa mahyāya wa mamātī lillāhi rabbi 'l-`ālamīna. lā sharīka lahu. Wa bi dhālika umirtu wa ana min al-muslimīna. Allāhumma anta 'l-maliku lā ilāha illā anta. Anta rabbī wa ana `abduka,ẓalamtu nafsī wa`taraftu bi dhanbī. Faghfir lī dhunūbī jamī`an. innahu lā yaghfiru 'dh-dhunūba illā anta. Wahdinī li-aḥsani 'l-akhlāqi. lā yahdī li aḥsanihā illā anta. Waṣrif `annī sayyi'ahā. lā yaṣrifu `annī sayyi'ahā illā anta. Labbayka wa sa`dayka. wa 'l-khayru kulluhu bi yadayka. wa 'sh-sharru laysa ilayka. ana bika wa ilayka. tabārakta wa ta`ālayta. astaghfiruka wa atūbu ilayka.
duas.translation_en: I have turned my face sincerely towards He who has brought forth the heavens and the Earth and I am not of those who associate (others with Allah). Indeed my prayer, my sacrifice, my life and my death are for Allah, Lord of the worlds, no partner has He, with this I am commanded and I am of the Muslims. O Allah, You are the Sovereign, none has the right to be worshipped except You. You are my Lord and I am Your servant, I have wronged my own soul and have acknowledged my sin, so forgive me all my sins for no one forgives sins except You. Guide me to the best of characters for none can guide to it other than You, and deliver me from the worst of characters for none can deliver me from it other than You. Here I am, in answer to Your call, happy to serve you. All good is within Your hands and evil does not stem from You. I exist by your will and will return to you. Blessed and High are You, I seek Your forgiveness and repent unto You.
duas.translation_ar: وَجَّهـتُ وَجْهِـيَ لِلَّذي فَطَرَ السَّمـواتِ وَالأَرْضَ حَنـيفَاً وَمـا أَنا مِنَ المشْرِكين إِنَّ صَلاتـي وَنُسُكي وَمَحْـيايَ وَمَماتـي للهِ رَبِّ العالَمين لا شَريـكَ لَهُ وَبِذلكَ أُمِرْتُ وَأَنا مِنَ المسْلِـمين. اللّهُـمَّ أَنْتَ المَلِكُ لا إِلهَ إِلاّ أَنْت أَنْتَ رَبِّـي وَأَنـا عَبْـدُك ظَلَمْـتُ نَفْسـي وَاعْـتَرَفْتُ بِذَنْبـي فَاغْفِرْ لي ذُنوبي جَميعاً إِنَّـه لا يَغْـفِرُ الذُّنـوبَ إلاّ أَنْت. وَاهْدِنـي لأَحْسَنِ الأَخْلاقِ لا يَهْـدي لأَحْسَـنِها إِلاّ أَنْـت وَاصْـرِف عَـنّْي سَيِّئَهـا لا يَصْرِفُ عَـنّْي سَيِّئَهـا إِلاّ أَنْـت لَبَّـيْكَ وَسَعْـدَيْك وَالخَـيْرُ كُلُّـهُ بِيَـدَيْـك وَالشَّرُّ لَيْـسَ إِلَـيْك أَنا بِكَ وَإِلَيْـك تَبـارَكْتَ وَتَعـالَيتَ أَسْتَغْـفِرُكَ وَأَتوبُ إِلَـيك

duas.arabic: اللّهُـمَّ رَبَّ جِـبْرائيل وَميكـائيل وَإِسْـرافيل فاطِـرَ السَّمواتِ وَالأَرْض عالـِمَ الغَيْـبِ وَالشَّهـادَةِ أَنْـتَ تَحْـكمُ بَيْـنَ عِبـادِكَ فيـما كانوا فيهِ يَخْتَلِفـون. اهدِنـي لِمـا اخْتُـلِفَ فيـهِ مِنَ الْحَـقِّ بِإِذْنِك إِنَّـكَ تَهْـدي مَنْ تَشـاءُ إِلى صِراطٍ مُسْتَقـيم
duas.transliteration: Allāhumma, rabba Jibrā'īla, wa Mīkā'īla, wa IsrāfīlaFāṭira 's-samāwāti wa 'l-arḍi, `ālima 'l-ghaybi wa 'sh-shahādati. anta taḥkumu bayna `ibādika fīmā kānū fīhi yakhtalifūna. Ihdinī li makhtulifa fīhi min al-ḥaqqi bi idhnika. Innaka tahdī man tashā'u ilā ṣirāṭin mustaqīm.
duas.translation_en: O Allah, Lord of Jibraīl, Mīkaīl and Israfīl (great angels), Creator of the heavens and the Earth, Knower of the seen and the unseen. You are the arbitrator between Your servants in that which they have disputed. Guide me to the truth by Your leave, in that which they have differed, for verily You guide whom You will to a straight path."
duas.translation_ar: اللّهُـمَّ رَبَّ جِـبْرائيل وَميكـائيل وَإِسْـرافيل فاطِـرَ السَّمواتِ وَالأَرْض عالـِمَ الغَيْـبِ وَالشَّهـادَةِ أَنْـتَ تَحْـكمُ بَيْـنَ عِبـادِكَ فيـما كانوا فيهِ يَخْتَلِفـون. اهدِنـي لِمـا اخْتُـلِفَ فيـهِ مِنَ الْحَـقِّ بِإِذْنِك إِنَّـكَ تَهْـدي مَنْ تَشـاءُ إِلى صِراطٍ مُسْتَقـيم

duas.arabic: أَعـوذُ بِاللهِ مِنَ الشَّـيْطانِ مِنْ نَفْخِـهِ وَنَفْـثِهِ وَهَمْـزِه
duas.transliteration: Allāhu 'Akbar Kabīra. Allāhu 'Akbar Kabīra. Allāhu 'Akbar Kabīra. walḥamdu lillāhi kathīra. walḥamdu lillāhi kathīra. walḥamdu lillāhi kathīra. wa Subḥānallāhi bukratan wa'aṣīla. [Recite three times in Arabic.] 'A `ūdhu billāhi min ash-shayṭānmin nafkhihi, wa nafthihi, wa hamzihi.
duas.translation_en: Allah is the Greatest, Most Great. Allah is the Greatest, Most Great. Allah is the Greatest, Most Great. Praise is to Allah, abundantly. Praise is to Allah, abundantly. Praise is to Allah, abundantly. Glory is to Allah, at the break of day and at its end. [Recite three times in Arabic.] I seek refuge in Allah from Satan. From his breath, and from his voice, and from his whisper.
duas.translation_ar: أَعـوذُ بِاللهِ مِنَ الشَّـيْطانِ مِنْ نَفْخِـهِ وَنَفْـثِهِ وَهَمْـزِه

duas.arabic: أَنْـتَ إِلـهي لا إِاـهَ إِلاّ أَنْـت
duas.transliteration: Allāhumma lakal-ḥamdu 'Anta nūrussamāwāti wal'arḍhi wa man fīhinna. wa lakal-ḥamdu 'Anta qayyimus-samāwāti wal'arḍi wa man fīhinna,
duas.translation_en: [wa lakal-ḥamdu 'Anta Rabbus-samāwāti wal'arḍi wa man fīhinna]
duas.translation_ar: أَنْـتَ إِلـهي لا إِاـهَ إِلاّ أَنْـت

duas.arabic: سُبْـحانَ رَبِّـيَ الْعَظـيم
duas.transliteration: Subḥāna Rabbiyal-`Aẓīm.
duas.translation_en: Glory to my Lord the Exalted (three times in Arabic)
duas.translation_ar: سُبْـحانَ رَبِّـيَ الْعَظـيم

duas.arabic: سُبْـحانَكَ اللّهُـمَّ رَبَّـنا وَبِحَـمْدِك اللّهُـمَّ اغْفِـرْ لي
duas.transliteration: Subḥānaka Allāhumma Rabbanā wa biḥamdika Allāhum-maghfir lī.
duas.translation_en: Glory is to You, O Allah, our Lord, and praise is Yours. O Allah, forgive me.
duas.translation_ar: سُبْـحانَكَ اللّهُـمَّ رَبَّـنا وَبِحَـمْدِك اللّهُـمَّ اغْفِـرْ لي

duas.arabic: سُبـّوحٌ قُـدّْوس رَبُّ الملائِكَـةِ وَالـرُّوح
duas.transliteration: Subbūḥun, Quddūsun, Rabbul-malā'ikati warrūḥ.
duas.translation_en: Glory (to You), Most Holy (are You), Lord of the angels and the Spirit.
duas.translation_ar: سُبـّوحٌ قُـدّْوس رَبُّ الملائِكَـةِ وَالـرُّوح

duas.arabic: اللّهُـمَّ لَكَ رَكَـعْتُ وَبِكَ آمَـنْت ولَكَ أَسْلَـمْت خَشَـعَ لَكَ سَمْـعي وَبَصَـري وَمُخِّـي وَعَظْمـي وَعَصَـبي وَما استَقَـلَّ بِهِ قَدَمي
duas.transliteration: Allāhumma laka raka`tu. wa bika 'āmantu, wa laka 'aslamtukhasha`a laka sam`ee wa baṣarī. wa mukhkhī, wa `aẓmī, wa `aṣabī. wa mastaqalla bihi qadamī.
duas.translation_en: O Allah, to You I bow (in prayer) and in You I believe and to You I have submitted. Before You my hearing is humbled, and my sight, and my mind, my bones, my nerves and what my feet have mounted upon (for travel).
duas.translation_ar: اللّهُـمَّ لَكَ رَكَـعْتُ وَبِكَ آمَـنْت ولَكَ أَسْلَـمْت خَشَـعَ لَكَ سَمْـعي وَبَصَـري وَمُخِّـي وَعَظْمـي وَعَصَـبي وَما استَقَـلَّ بِهِ قَدَمي

duas.arabic: سُبْـحانَ ذي الْجَبَـروت والمَلَـكوت وَالكِبْـرِياء وَالْعَظَـمَةِ
duas.transliteration: Subḥāna dhil-jabarūti, walmalakūti, walkibriyā'i, wal`aẓamati.
duas.translation_en: Glory is to You, Master of power, of dominion, of majesty and greatness.
duas.translation_ar: سُبْـحانَ ذي الْجَبَـروت والمَلَـكوت وَالكِبْـرِياء وَالْعَظَـمَةِ

duas.arabic: سَمِـعَ اللهُ لِمَـنْ حَمِـدَه
duas.transliteration: Sami`allāhu liman ḥamidah.
duas.translation_en: Allah hears whoever praises Him.
duas.translation_ar: سَمِـعَ اللهُ لِمَـنْ حَمِـدَه

duas.arabic: رَبَّنـا وَلَكَ الحَمْـدُ حَمْـداً كَثـيراً طَيِّـباً مُـبارَكاً فيه
duas.transliteration: Rabbanā wa lakal-ḥamd,ḥamdan kathīran ṭayyiban mubārakan fīh.
duas.translation_en: Our Lord, praise is Yours, abundant, good and blessed praise.
duas.translation_ar: رَبَّنـا وَلَكَ الحَمْـدُ حَمْـداً كَثـيراً طَيِّـباً مُـبارَكاً فيه

duas.arabic: مِلْءَ السَّمـواتِ وَمِلْءَ الأَرْض وَما بَيْـنَهُمـا وَمِلْءَ ما شِئْـتَ مِنْ شَيءٍ بَعْـد . أَهـلَ الثَّـناءِ وَالمَجـد أََحَـقُّ ما قالَ العَبْـد وَكُلُّـنا لَكَ عَـبد . اللّهُـمَّ لا مانِعَ لِما أَعْطَـيْت وَلا مُعْطِـيَ لِما مَنَـعْت وَلا يَنْفَـعُ ذا الجَـدِّ مِنْـكَ الجَـد
duas.transliteration: Mil'a 's-samāwāti wa mil'a 'l-'arḍi wa mā baynahumā. wa mil'a mā shi'ta min shay'in ba`d.'Ahla 'th-thanā'i wa 'l-majdi,'aḥaqqu mā qāla 'l-`abdu. wa kullunā laka `abdun. Allāhumma lā māni`a limā 'a`ṭayta. wa lā mu`ṭiya limā mana`ta. wa lā yanfa`u dhal-jaddi minka 'l-jadd..
duas.translation_en: (A praise that) fills the heavens and the earth and what lies between them, and whatever else You please. (You Allah) are most worthy of praise and majesty, and what the slave has said - we are all Your slaves. O Allah, there is none who can withhold what You give, and none may give what You have withheld. And the might of the mighty person cannot benefit him against You.
duas.translation_ar: مِلْءَ السَّمـواتِ وَمِلْءَ الأَرْض وَما بَيْـنَهُمـا وَمِلْءَ ما شِئْـتَ مِنْ شَيءٍ بَعْـد . أَهـلَ الثَّـناءِ وَالمَجـد أََحَـقُّ ما قالَ العَبْـد وَكُلُّـنا لَكَ عَـبد . اللّهُـمَّ لا مانِعَ لِما أَعْطَـيْت وَلا مُعْطِـيَ لِما مَنَـعْت وَلا يَنْفَـعُ ذا الجَـدِّ مِنْـكَ الجَـد

duas.arabic: سُبْـحانَ رَبِّـيَ الأَعْلـى
duas.transliteration: Subḥāna Rabbiya ‘l-a`lā.
duas.translation_en: Glory is to my Lord, the Most High.
duas.translation_ar: سُبْـحانَ رَبِّـيَ الأَعْلـى

duas.arabic: سُبْـحانَكَ اللّهُـمَّ رَبَّـنا وَبِحَـمْدِكَ اللّهُـمَّ اغْفِرْ لي
duas.transliteration: Subḥānaka Allāhumma Rabbanā wa biḥamdika Allāhumma ‘ghfir lī.
duas.translation_en: Glory is to You, O Allah, our Lord, and praise is Yours. O Allah, forgive me.
duas.translation_ar: سُبْـحانَكَ اللّهُـمَّ رَبَّـنا وَبِحَـمْدِكَ اللّهُـمَّ اغْفِرْ لي

duas.arabic: سُبـّوحٌ قُـدّوس رَبُّ الملائِكَـةِ وَالـرُّوح
duas.transliteration: Subbūḥun, Quddūsun, Rabbu ‘l-malā'ikati warrūḥ.
duas.translation_en: Glory (to You), Most Holy (are You), Lord of the angels and the Spirit.
duas.translation_ar: سُبـّوحٌ قُـدّوس رَبُّ الملائِكَـةِ وَالـرُّوح

duas.arabic: اللّهُـمَّ لَكَ سَـجَدْتُ وَبِـكَ آمَنْـت وَلَكَ أَسْلَـمْت سَجَـدَ وَجْهـي للَّـذي خَلَقَـهُ وَصَـوَّرَهُ وَشَقَّ سَمْـعَـهُ وَبَصَـرَه تَبـارَكَ اللهُ أَحْسـنُ الخـالِقيـن
duas.transliteration: Allāhumma laka sajadtuwa bika āmantu. wa laka aslamtu. sajada waj’hiya lilladhī khalaqahu, wa ṣawwarahu. wa shaqqa sam`ahu wa baṣarahu. tabārakallāhu 'aḥsanul-khāliqīn.
duas.translation_en: O Allah, to You I prostrate myself and in You I believe. To You I have submitted. My face is prostrated to the One Who created it, fashioned it, and gave it hearing and sight. Blessed is Allah, the Best of creators
duas.translation_ar: اللّهُـمَّ لَكَ سَـجَدْتُ وَبِـكَ آمَنْـت وَلَكَ أَسْلَـمْت سَجَـدَ وَجْهـي للَّـذي خَلَقَـهُ وَصَـوَّرَهُ وَشَقَّ سَمْـعَـهُ وَبَصَـرَه تَبـارَكَ اللهُ أَحْسـنُ الخـالِقيـن

duas.arabic: سُبْـحانَ ذي الْجَبَـروت والمَلَكـوت والكِبْـرِياء وَالعَظَمَـةِ
duas.transliteration: Subḥāna dhi ’l-jabarūti, wa ’l-malakūti, wa ‘l-kibriyā'i, wa ‘l-aẓamati.
duas.translation_en: Glory is to the master of power, sovereignty, of majesty and greatness.
duas.translation_ar: سُبْـحانَ ذي الْجَبَـروت والمَلَكـوت والكِبْـرِياء وَالعَظَمَـةِ

duas.arabic: اللّهُـمَّ اغْفِـرْ لي ذَنْـبي كُلَّـه دِقَّـهُ وَجِلَّـه وَأَوَّلَـهُ وَآخِـرَه وَعَلانِيَّتَـهُ وَسِـرَّه
duas.transliteration: Allāhumma’ghfir lī dhanbī kullahu. diqqahu wa jillahu. wa awwalahu wa ākhirahuwa `alāniyyatahu wa sirrahu.
duas.translation_en: O Allah, forgive me all my sins, great and small, the first and the last, those that are apparent and those that are hidden.
duas.translation_ar: اللّهُـمَّ اغْفِـرْ لي ذَنْـبي كُلَّـه دِقَّـهُ وَجِلَّـه وَأَوَّلَـهُ وَآخِـرَه وَعَلانِيَّتَـهُ وَسِـرَّه

duas.arabic: اللّهُـمَّ إِنِّـي أَعـوذُ بِرِضـاكَ مِنْ سَخَطِـك وَبِمعـافاتِـكَ مِنْ عُقوبَـتِك وَأَعـوذُ بِكَ مِنْـك لا أُحْصـي ثَنـاءً عَلَـيْك أَنْـتَ كَمـا أَثْنَـيْتَ عَلـى نَفْسـِك
duas.transliteration: Allāhumma innī a`ūdhu biriḍāka min sakhaṭika. wa bimu`āfātika min `uqūbatikawa a`ūdhu bika minkalā uḥṣī thanā'an `alaykaanta kamā athnayta `alā nafsika.
duas.translation_en: O Allah, I seek protection in Your pleasure from Your anger, and I seek protection in Your forgiveness from Your punishment. I seek protection in You from You. I cannot count Your praises. You are as You have praised Yourself.
duas.translation_ar: اللّهُـمَّ إِنِّـي أَعـوذُ بِرِضـاكَ مِنْ سَخَطِـك وَبِمعـافاتِـكَ مِنْ عُقوبَـتِك وَأَعـوذُ بِكَ مِنْـك لا أُحْصـي ثَنـاءً عَلَـيْك أَنْـتَ كَمـا أَثْنَـيْتَ عَلـى نَفْسـِك

duas.arabic: رَبِّ اغْفِـرْ لي رَبِّ اغْفِـرْ لي
duas.transliteration: Rabbi’ghfir lī, Rabbi’ghfir lī.
duas.translation_en: Lord, forgive me. My Lord, forgive me.
duas.translation_ar: رَبِّ اغْفِـرْ لي رَبِّ اغْفِـرْ لي

duas.arabic: اللّهُـمَّ اغْفِـرْ لي وَارْحَمْـني وَاهْدِنـي وَاجْبُرْنـي وَعافِنـي وَارْزُقْنـي وَارْفَعْـني
duas.transliteration: Allāhumma’ghfir lī, war’ḥamnī. wahdinī, wajburnī. wa `āfinī, warzuqnī, warfa`nī.
duas.translation_en: O Allah forgive me, have mercy on me, guide me, support me, protect me, provide for me, and elevate me.
duas.translation_ar: اللّهُـمَّ اغْفِـرْ لي وَارْحَمْـني وَاهْدِنـي وَاجْبُرْنـي وَعافِنـي وَارْزُقْنـي وَارْفَعْـني

duas.arabic: فتَبـارَكَ اللهُ أَحْسَـنُ الخـالِقيـن
duas.transliteration: Sajada wajhiya lilladhī khalaqahu. wa shaqqa sam`ahu wa baṣarahu biḥawlihi wa quwwatihi. Fatabārakallāhu 'aḥsanul-khāliqīn.
duas.translation_en: I have prostrated my face to the One Who created it, and gave it hearing and sight by His might and His power. Glory is to Allah, the Best of creators.
duas.translation_ar: فتَبـارَكَ اللهُ أَحْسَـنُ الخـالِقيـن

duas.arabic: اللّهُـمَّ اكْتُـبْ لي بِهـا عِنْـدَكَ أَجْـراً وَضَـعْ عَنِّـي بِهـا وِزْراً وَاجْعَـلها لي عِنْـدَكَ ذُخْـراً وَتَقَبَّـلها مِنِّي كَمَا تَقَبَّلْتَهَا مِنْ عَبْدِكَ دَاوُدَ
duas.transliteration: Allāhummak’tub lī bihā `indaka ajra. waḍa` `annī bihā wizra. waj`alhā lī `indaka dhukhra. wa taqabbal’hā minnī kamā taqabbal’tahā min `abdika Dāwūd.
duas.translation_en: O Allah, write it as a reward for me, and release me from a burden for it, and make it a treasure for me with You. Accept it from me as You accepted it from your servant Dawud.
duas.translation_ar: اللّهُـمَّ اكْتُـبْ لي بِهـا عِنْـدَكَ أَجْـراً وَضَـعْ عَنِّـي بِهـا وِزْراً وَاجْعَـلها لي عِنْـدَكَ ذُخْـراً وَتَقَبَّـلها مِنِّي كَمَا تَقَبَّلْتَهَا مِنْ عَبْدِكَ دَاوُدَ

duas.arabic: التَّحِيّـاتُ للهِ وَالصَّلَـواتُ والطَّيِّـبات السَّلامُ عَلَيـكَ أَيُّهـا النَّبِـيُّ وَرَحْمَـةُ اللهِ وَبَرَكـاتُه السَّلامُ عَلَيْـناوَعَلـى عِبـادِ للهِ الصَّـالِحـين . أَشْـهَدُ أَنْ لا إِلـهَ إِلاّ الله وَأَشْـهَدُ أَنَّ مُحَمّـداً عَبْـدُهُ وَرَسـولُه
duas.transliteration: Attaḥiyyātu lillāhi waṣṣalawātu, waṭṭayyibāt. assalāmu `alayka 'ayyuhan-Nabiyyuwa raḥmatullāhi wa barakātuh. assalāmu `alaynā wa `alā ‘ibādillāhiṣ-ṣāliḥīn.'Ash-hadu 'an lā 'ilāha 'illallāhwa 'ash-hadu 'anna Muḥammadan `abduhu wa rasūluh.
duas.translation_en: All greetings of humility are for Allah, and all prayers and goodness. Peace be upon you, O Prophet, and the mercy of Allah and His blessings. Peace be upon us and upon the righteous slaves of Allah. I bear witness that there is none worthy of worship but Allah, and I bear witness that Muhammad is His slave and His Messenger.
duas.translation_ar: التَّحِيّـاتُ للهِ وَالصَّلَـواتُ والطَّيِّـبات السَّلامُ عَلَيـكَ أَيُّهـا النَّبِـيُّ وَرَحْمَـةُ اللهِ وَبَرَكـاتُه السَّلامُ عَلَيْـناوَعَلـى عِبـادِ للهِ الصَّـالِحـين . أَشْـهَدُ أَنْ لا إِلـهَ إِلاّ الله وَأَشْـهَدُ أَنَّ مُحَمّـداً عَبْـدُهُ وَرَسـولُه

duas.arabic: اللّهُـمَّ صَلِّ عَلـى مُحمَّـد وَعَلـى آلِ مُحمَّد كَمـا صَلَّيـتَ عَلـى إبْراهـيمَ وَعَلـى آلِ إبْراهـيم إِنَّكَ حَمـيدٌ مَجـيد اللّهُـمَّ بارِكْ عَلـى مُحمَّـد وَعَلـى آلِ مُحمَّـد كَمـا بارِكْتَ عَلـى إبْراهـيمَ وَعَلـى آلِ إبْراهيم إِنَّكَ حَمـيدٌ مَجـيد
duas.transliteration: Allāhumma ṣalli `alā Muḥammadinwa `alā ’āli Muḥammadin. kamā ṣallayta `alā 'Ibrāhīma wa `alā ’āli 'Ibrāhīma, 'innaka ḥamīdum-majīd. Allāhumma bārik `alā Muḥammadin wa `alā ’āli Muḥammadin. kamā bārakta `alā 'Ibrāhīma wa `alā 'āli 'Ibrāhīma,'innaka ḥamīdum-majīd.
duas.translation_en: O Allah, bestow Your favor on Muhammad and on the family of Muhammad as You have bestowed Your favor on Ibrahim and on the family of Ibrahim, You are Praiseworthy, Most Glorious. O Allah, bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad as You have blessed Ibrahim and the family of Ibrahim, You are Praiseworthy, Most Glorious.
duas.translation_ar: اللّهُـمَّ صَلِّ عَلـى مُحمَّـد وَعَلـى آلِ مُحمَّد كَمـا صَلَّيـتَ عَلـى إبْراهـيمَ وَعَلـى آلِ إبْراهـيم إِنَّكَ حَمـيدٌ مَجـيد اللّهُـمَّ بارِكْ عَلـى مُحمَّـد وَعَلـى آلِ مُحمَّـد كَمـا بارِكْتَ عَلـى إبْراهـيمَ وَعَلـى آلِ إبْراهيم إِنَّكَ حَمـيدٌ مَجـيد

duas.arabic: للّهُـمَّ صَلِّ عَلـى مُحمَّـدٍ وَعَلـى أَزْواجِـهِ وَذُرِّيَّـتِه كَمـا صَلَّيْـتَ عَلـى آلِ إبْراهـيم . وَبارِكْ عَلـى مُحمَّـدٍ وَعَلـى أَزْواجِـهِ وَذُرِّيَّـتِه كَمـا بارِكْتَ عَلـى آلِ إبْراهـيم . إِنَّكَ حَمـيدٌ مَجـيد
duas.transliteration: Allāhumma ṣalli `alā Muḥammadinwa `alā 'azwājihi wa dhurriyyatihi. kamā ṣallayta `alā 'āli 'Ibrāhīma. Wa bārik `alā Muḥammadinwa `alā 'azwājihi wa dhurriyyatihi. kamā bārakta `alā 'āli 'Ibrāhīma.'Innaka ḥamīdum-majīd.
duas.translation_en: O Allah, bestow Your favor on Muhammad and upon his wives and progeny as You have bestowed Your favor upon the family of Ibrahim. And bless Muhammad and his wives and progeny as You have blessed the family of Ibrahim, You are full of praise, Most Glorious.
duas.translation_ar: للّهُـمَّ صَلِّ عَلـى مُحمَّـدٍ وَعَلـى أَزْواجِـهِ وَذُرِّيَّـتِه كَمـا صَلَّيْـتَ عَلـى آلِ إبْراهـيم . وَبارِكْ عَلـى مُحمَّـدٍ وَعَلـى أَزْواجِـهِ وَذُرِّيَّـتِه كَمـا بارِكْتَ عَلـى آلِ إبْراهـيم . إِنَّكَ حَمـيدٌ مَجـيد

duas.arabic: اللّهُـمَّ إِنِّـي أَعـوذُ بِكَ مِـنْ عَذابِ القَـبْر وَمِـنْ عَذابِ جَهَـنَّم وَمِـنْ فِتْـنَةِ المَحْـيا وَالمَمـات وَمِـنْ شَـرِّ فِتْـنَةِ المَسيحِ الدَّجّال
duas.transliteration: Allāhumma ‘innī ‘a`ūdhu bika min `adhābi ‘l-qabri. wa min `adhābi jahannam. wa min fitnati ‘l-maḥyā wa ‘l-mamāti. wa min sharri fitnati ‘l-masīḥid-dajjāl.
duas.translation_en: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from the punishment of the grave, and from the punishment of Hell-fire, and from the trials of life and death, and from the evil of the trial of the False Messiah.
duas.translation_ar: اللّهُـمَّ إِنِّـي أَعـوذُ بِكَ مِـنْ عَذابِ القَـبْر وَمِـنْ عَذابِ جَهَـنَّم وَمِـنْ فِتْـنَةِ المَحْـيا وَالمَمـات وَمِـنْ شَـرِّ فِتْـنَةِ المَسيحِ الدَّجّال

duas.arabic: اللّهُـمَّ إِنِّـي أَعـوذُ بِكَ مِـنْ عَذابِ القَـبْر وَأَعـوذُ بِكَ مِـنْ فِتْـنَةِ المَسيحِ الدَّجّـال أَعـوذُ بِكَ مِـنْ فِتْـنَةِ المَحْـيا وَالمَمـات . اللّهُـمَّ إِنِّـي أَعـوذُ بِكَ مِنَ المَأْثَـمِ وَالمَغْـرَم
duas.transliteration: Allāhumma 'innī ‘a`ūdhu bika min `adhābi ‘l-qabr. wa ‘a`ūdhu bika min fitnati ‘l-masīḥid-dajjāl. wa ‘a`ūdhu bika min fitnati ‘l-maḥyā wa ‘l-mamāt. Allāhumma ‘innī ‘a`ūdhu bika mina ‘l-m’athami wa ‘l-maghram.
duas.translation_en: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from the punishment of the grave, and I seek refuge in You from the trial of the False Messiah, and I seek refuge in You from the trials of life and death. O Allah, I seek refuge in You from sin and from debt.
duas.translation_ar: اللّهُـمَّ إِنِّـي أَعـوذُ بِكَ مِـنْ عَذابِ القَـبْر وَأَعـوذُ بِكَ مِـنْ فِتْـنَةِ المَسيحِ الدَّجّـال أَعـوذُ بِكَ مِـنْ فِتْـنَةِ المَحْـيا وَالمَمـات . اللّهُـمَّ إِنِّـي أَعـوذُ بِكَ مِنَ المَأْثَـمِ وَالمَغْـرَم

duas.arabic: اللّهُـمَّ إِنِّـي ظَلَـمْتُ نَفْسـي ظُلْمـاً كَثـيراً وَلا يَغْـفِرُ الذُّنـوبَ إِلاّ أَنْت فَاغْـفِر لي مَغْـفِرَةً مِنْ عِنْـدِك وَارْحَمْـني إِنَّكَ أَنْتَ الغَـفورُ الرَّحـيم
duas.transliteration: Allāhumma ‘innī ẓalamtu nafsī ẓulman kathīran. wa lā yaghfiru-dhdhunūba illā 'anta. faghfir lī maghfiratam’min `indika warḥamnīinnaka 'anta ‘l-Ghafūr ur-Rahīm.
duas.translation_en: O Allah, I have greatly wronged myself, and no one forgives sins but You. So, grant me forgiveness and have mercy on me. Surely, you are Forgiving, Merciful.
duas.translation_ar: اللّهُـمَّ إِنِّـي ظَلَـمْتُ نَفْسـي ظُلْمـاً كَثـيراً وَلا يَغْـفِرُ الذُّنـوبَ إِلاّ أَنْت فَاغْـفِر لي مَغْـفِرَةً مِنْ عِنْـدِك وَارْحَمْـني إِنَّكَ أَنْتَ الغَـفورُ الرَّحـيم

duas.arabic: اللّهُـمَّ اغْـفِرْ لي ما قَدَّمْـتُ وَما أَخَّرْت وَما أَسْـرَرْتُ وَما أَعْلَـنْت وَما أَسْـرَفْت وَما أَنْتَ أَعْـلَمُ بِهِ مِنِّي . أَنْتَ المُقَـدِّمُ وَأَنْتَ المُـؤَخِّـرُ لا إِلهَ إِلاّ أَنْـت
duas.transliteration: Allāhummagh’fir lī mā qaddamtu, wa mā ‘akhkhartu. wa mā ‘asrartu, wa mā ‘a`lantu. wa mā ‘asraftu, wa mā 'anta ‘a`lamu bihi minnī.‘anta ‘l-Muqaddimu, wa 'anta ‘l-Mu‘akhkhirulā 'ilāha 'illā 'anta.
duas.translation_en: O Allah, forgive me what I have sent before me and what I have left behind me, what I have concealed and what I have done openly, what I have done in excess, and what You are better aware of than I. You are the One Who sends forth and You are the One Who delays. There is none worthy of worship but You.
duas.translation_ar: اللّهُـمَّ اغْـفِرْ لي ما قَدَّمْـتُ وَما أَخَّرْت وَما أَسْـرَرْتُ وَما أَعْلَـنْت وَما أَسْـرَفْت وَما أَنْتَ أَعْـلَمُ بِهِ مِنِّي . أَنْتَ المُقَـدِّمُ وَأَنْتَ المُـؤَخِّـرُ لا إِلهَ إِلاّ أَنْـت

duas.arabic: اللّهُـمَّ أَعِـنِّي عَلـى ذِكْـرِكَ وَشُكْـرِك وَحُسْـنِ عِبـادَتِـك
duas.transliteration: Allāhumma ‘a`innī `alā dhikrika, wa shukrika. wa ḥusni `ibādatik.
duas.translation_en: O Allah, help me to remember You, to give You thanks, and to perform Your worship in the best manner.
duas.translation_ar: اللّهُـمَّ أَعِـنِّي عَلـى ذِكْـرِكَ وَشُكْـرِك وَحُسْـنِ عِبـادَتِـك

duas.arabic: اللّهُـمَّ إِنِّـي أَعوذُ بِكَ مِنَ البُخْـل وَأَعوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الجُـبْن وَأَعوذُ بِكَ مِنْ أَنْ أُرَدَّ إِلى أَرْذَلِ الـعُمُر وَأََعوذُ بِكَ مِنْ فِتْنَـةِ الدُّنْـيا وَعَـذابِ القَـبْر
duas.transliteration: Allāhumma 'innī ‘a`udhu bika mina ‘l-bukhl. wa ‘a`udhu bika mina ‘l-jubn. wa ‘a`udhu bika min ‘an ‘uradda ilā ‘ardhali ‘l-`umur. wa ‘a`udhu bika min fitnatid-dunyā wa `adhābi ‘l-qabr.
duas.translation_en: O Allah, I seek Your protection from miserliness, I seek Your protection from cowardice, and I seek Your protection from being returned to feeble old age. I seek Your protection from the trials of this world and from the torment of the grave.
duas.translation_ar: اللّهُـمَّ إِنِّـي أَعوذُ بِكَ مِنَ البُخْـل وَأَعوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الجُـبْن وَأَعوذُ بِكَ مِنْ أَنْ أُرَدَّ إِلى أَرْذَلِ الـعُمُر وَأََعوذُ بِكَ مِنْ فِتْنَـةِ الدُّنْـيا وَعَـذابِ القَـبْر

duas.arabic: اللّهُـمَّ إِنِّـي أَسْأَلُـكَ الجَـنَّةَ وأََعوذُ بِـكَ مِـنَ الـنّار
duas.transliteration: Allāhumma innī as'aluka ‘l-jannahwa a`ūdhu bika minan-nār.
duas.translation_en: O Allah, I ask You for Paradise, and I seek Your protection from the Fire.
duas.translation_ar: اللّهُـمَّ إِنِّـي أَسْأَلُـكَ الجَـنَّةَ وأََعوذُ بِـكَ مِـنَ الـنّار

duas.arabic: اللّهُـمَّ بِعِلْـمِكَ الغَـيْبِ وَقُـدْرَتِـكَ عَلـى الْخَلقِ أَحْـيِني ما عَلِـمْتَ الحـياةَ خَـيْراً لـي وَتَوَفَّـني إِذا عَلِـمْتَ الوَفـاةَ خَـيْراً لـي اللّهُـمَّ إِنِّـي أَسْـأَلُـكَ خَشْيَتَـكَ في الغَـيْبِ وَالشَّهـادَةِ وَأَسْـأَلُـكَ كَلِمَـةَ الحَـقِّ في الرِّضـا وَالغَضَـب وَأَسْـأَلُـكَ القَصْدَ في الغِنـى وَالفَقْـر أَسْـأَلُـكَ نَعـيماً لا يَنْفَـد وَأَسْـأَلُـكَ قُـرَّةَ عَيْـنٍ لا تَنْـقَطِعْ وَأَسْـأَلُـكَ الرِّضـا بَعْـدَ القَضـاء وَأَسْـأَلُـكَ بًـرْدَ الْعَـيْشِ بَعْـدَ الْمَـوْت وَأَسْـأَلُـكَ لَـذَّةَ النَّظَـرِ إِلـى وَجْـهِكَ وَالشَّـوْقَ إِلـى لِقـائِـك في غَـيرِ ضَـرّاءَ مُضِـرَّة وَلا فِتْـنَةٍ مُضـلَّة اللّهُـمَّ زَيِّـنّا بِزينَـةِ الإيـمان وَاجْـعَلنا هُـداةً مُهْـتَدين
duas.transliteration: Allāhumma bi `ilmika ‘l-ghayb, wa qudratika `ala ‘l-khalq. aḥyinī mā `alimta ‘l-ḥayāta khayran lī. wa tawaffanī idhā `alimta ‘l-wafāta khayran lī. Allāhumma innī as'aluka khash’yataka fil-ghaybi wash-shahādah. wa as'aluka kalimata ‘l-ḥaqqi fir-riḍā wa ‘l-ghaḍab. wa as'aluka ‘l-qaṣda fil-ghinā wa ‘l-faqr. wa as'aluka na`īman lā yanfad. wa as'aluka qurrata `aynin lā tanqati`. wa as'alukar-riḍā ba`dal-qaḍā'. wa as'aluka barda ‘l-`ayshi ba`da ‘l-mawt. wa as'aluka ladh-dhatan-naẓari ilā wajhik. wash-shawqa ilā liqā'ik. fī ghayri ḍarrā'a muḍirrah, wa lā fitnatin muḍillah. Allāhumma zayyinnā bi zīnati ‘l-'īmān. waj`alnā hudātan muhtadīn.
duas.translation_en: O Allah, by Your Knowledge of the unseen and by Your Power over creation, let me live if You know that life is good for me, and let me die if You know that death is good for me. O Allah, I ask You to grant me fear of You in private and in public. I ask you for the word of truth in times of contentment and anger. I ask You for moderation in wealth and in poverty. I ask you for blessings never ceasing and the coolness of my eye (i. e. pleasure) that never ends. I ask You for pleasure after Your Judgment and I ask You for a life of coolness after death. I ask You for the delight of gazing upon Your Face, and the joy of meeting You, without any harm and misleading trials befalling me. O Allah, dress us with the beauty of Faith and make us guides who are upon (correct) guidance.
duas.translation_ar: اللّهُـمَّ بِعِلْـمِكَ الغَـيْبِ وَقُـدْرَتِـكَ عَلـى الْخَلقِ أَحْـيِني ما عَلِـمْتَ الحـياةَ خَـيْراً لـي وَتَوَفَّـني إِذا عَلِـمْتَ الوَفـاةَ خَـيْراً لـي اللّهُـمَّ إِنِّـي أَسْـأَلُـكَ خَشْيَتَـكَ في الغَـيْبِ وَالشَّهـادَةِ وَأَسْـأَلُـكَ كَلِمَـةَ الحَـقِّ في الرِّضـا وَالغَضَـب وَأَسْـأَلُـكَ القَصْدَ في الغِنـى وَالفَقْـر أَسْـأَلُـكَ نَعـيماً لا يَنْفَـد وَأَسْـأَلُـكَ قُـرَّةَ عَيْـنٍ لا تَنْـقَطِعْ وَأَسْـأَلُـكَ الرِّضـا بَعْـدَ القَضـاء وَأَسْـأَلُـكَ بًـرْدَ الْعَـيْشِ بَعْـدَ الْمَـوْت وَأَسْـأَلُـكَ لَـذَّةَ النَّظَـرِ إِلـى وَجْـهِكَ وَالشَّـوْقَ إِلـى لِقـائِـك في غَـيرِ ضَـرّاءَ مُضِـرَّة وَلا فِتْـنَةٍ مُضـلَّة اللّهُـمَّ زَيِّـنّا بِزينَـةِ الإيـمان وَاجْـعَلنا هُـداةً مُهْـتَدين

duas.arabic: اللّهُـمَّ إِنِّـي أَسْأَلُـكَ يا اللهُ بِأَنَّـكَ الواحِـدُ الأَحَـد الصَّـمَدُ الَّـذي لَـمْ يَلِـدْ وَلَمْ يولَدْ وَلَمْ يَكـنْ لَهُ كُـفُواً أَحَـد أَنْ تَغْـفِرْ لي ذُنـوبي إِنَّـكَ أَنْـتَ الغَفـورُ الرَّحِّـيم
duas.transliteration: Allāhumma innī as'aluka yā Allāhbi'annaka ‘l-Wāḥidu ‘l-Aḥaduṣ-ṣamad. alladhī lam yalid wa lam yūlad. wa lam yakun lahu kufuwan aḥad. an taghfir lī dhunūbī. innaka anta ‘l-Ghafūrur-Raḥīm.
duas.translation_en: O Allah, I ask You. O Allah, You are the One, the Only, Self-Sufficient Master, Who was not begotten and begets not, and none is equal to Him. Forgive me my sins, surely you are Forgiving, Merciful.
duas.translation_ar: اللّهُـمَّ إِنِّـي أَسْأَلُـكَ يا اللهُ بِأَنَّـكَ الواحِـدُ الأَحَـد الصَّـمَدُ الَّـذي لَـمْ يَلِـدْ وَلَمْ يولَدْ وَلَمْ يَكـنْ لَهُ كُـفُواً أَحَـد أَنْ تَغْـفِرْ لي ذُنـوبي إِنَّـكَ أَنْـتَ الغَفـورُ الرَّحِّـيم

duas.arabic: اللّهُـمَّ إِنِّـي أَسْأَلُـكَ بِأَنَّ لَكَ الْحَـمْدُ لا إِلـهَ إِلاّ أَنْـتَ وَحْـدَكَ لا شَـريكَ لَـكَ المَنّـانُ يا بَديـعَ السَّمواتِ وَالأَرْضِ يا ذا الجَلالِ وَالإِكْـرام يا حَـيُّ يا قَـيّومُ إِنِّـي أَسْأَلُـكَ الجَـنَّةَ وَأَعـوذُ بِـكَ مِنَ الـنّار
duas.transliteration: Allāhumma innī as'aluka bi'anna laka ‘l-ḥamd. lā ilāha illā ant, waḥdaka lā sharīka lak. al-Mannān, yā Badī`as-samāwāti wa ‘l-arḍyā dha ‘l-Jalāli wa ‘l-'Ikrām, yā ḥayyu yā Qayyūm. innī as'aluka ‘l-jannah, wa a`ūdhu bika minan-nār.
duas.translation_en: O Allah, I ask You, as You are the Owner of praise, there is none worthy of worship but You alone, You have no partner. You are the Giver of all good. O Creator of the heavens and the earth, Owner of majesty and honor. O Living and Everlasting One, I ask you for Paradise, and I seek refuge in You from the fire.
duas.translation_ar: اللّهُـمَّ إِنِّـي أَسْأَلُـكَ بِأَنَّ لَكَ الْحَـمْدُ لا إِلـهَ إِلاّ أَنْـتَ وَحْـدَكَ لا شَـريكَ لَـكَ المَنّـانُ يا بَديـعَ السَّمواتِ وَالأَرْضِ يا ذا الجَلالِ وَالإِكْـرام يا حَـيُّ يا قَـيّومُ إِنِّـي أَسْأَلُـكَ الجَـنَّةَ وَأَعـوذُ بِـكَ مِنَ الـنّار

duas.arabic: للّهُـمَّ إِنِّـي أَسْأَلُـكَ بِأَنَّـي أَشْـهَدُ أَنَّـكَ أنْـتَ اللهُ لا إِلـهَ إِلاّ أَنْـت الأَحَـدُ الصَّـمَدُ الَّـذي لَـمْ يَلِـدْ وَلَمْ يولَـدْ وَلَمْ يَكـنْ لَهُ كُـفُواً أَحَـد
